// simplifying some commonly used conditionals

Macro.add("svg", {
    handler: function () {
        const passages = this.args.map(p => p.trim());
        const svgs = [];
        let viewBox = null;

        for (const name of passages) 
        {
            const passage = Story.get(name);
            const passageText = passage.contents ?? passage.element?.textContent ?? passage.element?.innerHTML ?? "";
            const parser  = new DOMParser();
            const svgDoc  = parser.parseFromString(passageText.trim(), 'image/svg+xml');
            const svgRoot = svgDoc.documentElement;
            if (!viewBox) viewBox = svgRoot.getAttribute('viewBox') || null;
            svgs.push(svgRoot.cloneNode(true));
        }

        const merged = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
        if (viewBox) merged.setAttribute("viewBox", viewBox);
        merged.setAttribute("xmlns", "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg");
        merged.setAttribute("preserveAspectRatio", "xMidYMid meet");
        merged.style.width = "100%";
        
        svgs.forEach((s, idx) => {
            const g = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
            g.setAttribute("id", `svg-group-${idx}`);
            while (s.firstChild) g.appendChild(s.firstChild);
            merged.appendChild(g);
        });

        const container = this._output;
        container.appendChild(merged);
    }
});

Macro.add('viewingredient', {
    tags : [],
    handler : function () {
        const ingredient = this.args[0];
        const ing = setup.Alchemy.value(false, true)[0].ingredients[ingredient] || setup.Alchemy.value(false)[0].ingredients[ingredient];
        const tooltipText = setup.get_tooltip_ingredients(ing);
        const result = `<span title="${tooltipText}">${ingredient}</span>`;
        jQuery(this.output).wiki(result);
    }
});

Macro.add('viewmilimeter', {
    tags : [],
    handler : function () {
        const part = this.args[0];
        let person = this.args[1];
        console.log(person);
        const part_desc = {
        "penis": [person.penis_descriptor(), "meter", [person["penis size"], person["penis girth"]]],
        "breast": [person.breast_descriptor(), "cup", person["height"]],
        "height": [person.height_descriptor(), "meter", person["breast size"]],
        }
        const desc = part_desc[part][0];
        const title = part_desc[part][1];
        const value = part_desc[part][2];
        const tooltipText = setup.convert_size(part, value);
        const result = `<span title="${tooltipText}">${desc}</span>`;
        jQuery(this.output).wiki(result);
    }
});

Macro.add("appearText", {
    tags: null,
    handler: function() {
        const raw = this.args[0] || "";
        const delayStep = 0.04;
        const letters = raw.split("");

        let result = "";
        for (let i = 0; i < letters.length; i++) 
        {
            const delay = (delayStep * i).toFixed(2);
            result += `<span class="appearance" style="animation-delay:${delay}s"><span class="shimmering white" style="animation-delay:${delay}s">${letters[i]}</span></span>`;
        }
        $(this.output).wiki(result);
    }
});

setup.bf_body_appeal_score = function()
{
    var pc = V.pc;
    if (!pc) return 0;
    var score = 0;

    if (pc.has_part("breasts"))
    {
        var b = pc["breast size"] || 0;
        if (b >= 700) score += 25;
        else if (b >= 500) score += 20;
        else if (b >= 300) score += 12;
        else if (b >= 150) score += 6;
        if (b > 900) score -= 5;
    }

    var a = pc["ass size"] || 0;
    if (a >= 700) score += 20;
    else if (a >= 500) score += 16;
    else if (a >= 300) score += 10;
    else if (a >= 150) score += 5;

    var hips = pc["hips size"] || 500;
    var waist = pc["waist size"] || 500;
    if (hips > 0)
    {
        var ratio = waist / hips;
        if (ratio < 0.61) score += 15;       // saddlebag
        else if (ratio < 0.71) score += 20;  // hourglass
        else if (ratio < 0.76) score += 12;  // wide
        else if (ratio < 0.81) score += 8;   // average
    }

    if (pc.has_part("penis") && !pc.has_part("vagina"))
    {
        var p = pc["penis size"] || 0;
        if (p >= 700) score += 20;
        else if (p >= 500) score += 15;
        else if (p >= 300) score += 8;
    }

    return Math.min(100, score);
};

setup.bf_body_appeal_fame_tick = function()
{
    if (typeof setup.cm_fame_add !== "function") return;
    var score = setup.bf_body_appeal_score();
    var gain = score >= 80 ? 3 : score >= 60 ? 2 : score >= 40 ? 1 : 0;
    if (gain > 0) setup.cm_fame_add("social", gain);
};

setup.bf_penis_rumour_tick = function()
{
    if (typeof setup.cm_fame_add !== "function") return;
    var pc = V.pc;
    if (!pc || !pc.has_part("penis")) return;

    var partners = 0;
    try {
        var db = setup.people_db();
        Object.keys(db).forEach(function(name) {
            if (typeof setup.people.has_sex_memory_with === "function")
            {
                if (setup.people.has_sex_memory_with(name, "pussy-fucking given") ||
                    setup.people.has_sex_memory_with(name, "ass-fucking given") ||
                    setup.people.has_sex_memory_with(name, "blowjob received"))
                    partners++;
            }
        });
    } catch(e) {}

    if (!V._bfRumourDay) V._bfRumourDay = 0;
    var today = typeof gameday !== "undefined" ? gameday : (V.gameday ?? 0);
    if (today <= V._bfRumourDay) return;
    V._bfRumourDay = today;

    var penisSize = pc["penis size"] || 0;
    var sizeBonus = penisSize >= 700 ? 2 : penisSize >= 500 ? 1 : 0;

    if (partners >= 10 && sizeBonus > 0) setup.cm_fame_add("scandal", 2 + sizeBonus);
    else if (partners >= 6 && sizeBonus > 0) setup.cm_fame_add("underground", 1 + sizeBonus);
    else if (partners >= 3 && sizeBonus > 0) setup.cm_fame_add("underground", sizeBonus);
};


setup.bf_tightness_arousal_mod = function(doer, target, part)
{
    if (!doer || !target) return 1.0;
    if (!doer.has_part("penis")) return 1.0;

    var girth = doer["penis girth"] || 0;
    var tight = part === "anus"
        ? (target.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] || 0)
        : (target.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] || 0);
    var lube = part === "anus"
        ? (target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"] || 1)
        : (target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] || 1);

    var mismatch = girth - tight;
    if (mismatch > 300 && lube < 300) return 0.4;  // very uncomfortable
    if (mismatch > 200 && lube < 200) return 0.6;  // uncomfortable
    if (mismatch > 100) return 0.8;                 // mild discomfort

    if (tight >= girth * 0.9 && tight > 200) return 1.3;  // well adjusted
    if (tight >= girth * 0.7 && tight > 100) return 1.15; // adjusting nicely

    return 1.0;
};

setup.bf_tightness_flavour = function(doer, target, part)
{
    if (!doer || !target) return "";
    if (!doer.has_part("penis")) return "";

    var girth = doer["penis girth"] || 0;
    var tight = part === "anus"
        ? (target.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] || 0)
        : (target.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] || 0);
    var lube  = part === "anus"
        ? (target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"] || 1)
        : (target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] || 1);
    var mismatch = girth - tight;

    if (mismatch > 300 && lube < 200)
        return part === "anus"
            ? "The fit is punishing -- girth against resistance, lube doing what it can but not enough yet."
            : "Too much at once. The stretch registers as something between sharp discomfort and the specific pressure of something that doesn't quite fit.";

    if (mismatch > 200 && lube < 300)
        return part === "anus"
            ? "There's resistance. Not insurmountable -- but present, every stroke."
            : "The size is noticeable in a way that hasn't resolved into pleasure yet. The body is still deciding what to do with it.";

    if (tight >= girth * 0.7 && tight < girth * 0.9)
        return part === "anus"
            ? "The resistance has softened. What was sharp is becoming something else."
            : "Something has shifted. The stretch that registered as too-much is starting to register as something more useful.";

   if (tight >= girth * 0.9 && tight > 200)
        return part === "anus"
            ? "Fully adjusted now. The fit is precise in the way that produces a specific quality of sensation."
            : "The body has made room for it. The discomfort is entirely gone and what replaced it is considerably better.";

    return "";
};

setup.encounter_button_class = function(actname)
{
	if (actname == "Continue" || actname == "Do Nothing" || actname == "Watch")
		return "button-sexact-continue";
	else if (actname.indexOf("Remove ") == 0)
		return "button-sexact-clothes";
	else if (actname.indexOf("Ask Not to ") == 0)
		return "button-sexact-request";
	else if (actname.indexOf("Resist ") == 0)
		return "button-sexact-resist";
	else if (actname.indexOf("Stop: ") == 0 || actname.indexOf("Pull Away: ") == 0 || actname == "End" || actname == "Escape" || actname == "Stop Watching")
		return "button-sexact-stop";
	else if (actname == "End to Survive No Goon Gourdtober")
		return "button-sexact-stopnonabort";
	else if (setup.sexacts[actname] && setup.sexacts[actname]["action type"][0] == "end")
		return "button-sexact-stop";
	else
		return "button-sexact";
}

 window.MeterDvd = function (bars, maxValue, baseId, overridecolor = null, displayValue = false) {
    const containerId = `${baseId}bkg`;
    let html = `<div class="hzbarbkg multi-bars" id="${containerId}">`;

    bars.forEach((b, i) => {
        let perc = b.value / maxValue;
        const name = b.id == "hzLubricatedVbar" ? "Vagina" : b.id == "hzLubricatedPbar" ? "Penis" : "Anus";
        let percInt = Math.round(perc * 100);
        let col = overridecolor || setup.get_meter_color(b.id, perc);
        let left = i * (100 / bars.length);
        let width = perc * (100 / bars.length);
        let title = `title="${percInt}% ${name}"`;
        let progBarTitle = V.optmeterhovertext ? title : "";

        let meterOverlay = V.optmetertext ? `<div class="meter-text">${percInt}%</div>` : "";

        html += `<div class="hzbar" id="${b.id}" style="left:${left}%; width:${width}%; background-color:${col};"></div><div class="meter-text" style="position:absolute; left:${left + (100 / bars.length)/2}% ; transform:translateX(-50%);">${meterOverlay}</div><div ${progBarTitle} style="position:absolute; left:${left}%; width:${(100 / bars.length)}%; top:0; height:100%; pointer-events:auto; background:transparent;"></div>`;
    });

    html += `</div>`;
    return html;
 };

setup.pledgetalk = function(npclist)
{
    let result = "";
    npclist.forEach((npc, i) => {
        let po = setup.people.pronouns(npc).po;
        let ps = setup.people.pronouns(npc).ps;
        let ppo = setup.people.pronouns(V.pc).po;
        let pps = setup.people.pronouns(V.pc).ps;
        let sibling = setup.pcgender().includes("female") ? "sister" : setup.pcgender().includes("male") ? "brother" : "sibling";
        let acc = setup.people.pronouns(npc).ps == "they" ? "" : "s";
        let pacc = setup.people.pronouns(V.pc).ps == "they" ? "" : "s";
        let psacc = setup.people.pronouns(V.pc).ps == "they" ? "'re" : "'s";
        
        if (i == 0) result += `A first member approach.\n`;
        else if (i == npclist.length - 1) result += `Finally, the last one make a step forwards.\n`;
        else result += `Then, another one approach.\n`;
        
        let shy = setup.people.has_any_inclination(npc, "shy");
        let dominant = setup.people.has_any_inclination(npc, "dominant");
        let crude = setup.people.has_any_inclination(npc, "crude");
        let kind = setup.people.has_any_inclination(npc, "kind");
        let confident = setup.people.has_any_inclination(npc, "confident");
        
        if (npc.pinfo && setup.Relationships.partner(npc) == "PC")
        {
            if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel the sacred bond that binds us." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to you, my loved one."\n\n`;
            else if (confident) result += `"My heart is yours, ${ppo}." ${ps} declare${acc}. "My pledge is unwavering."\n\n`;
            else if (shy) result += `"I... I feel so close to you, ${ppo}." ${ps} murmur${acc}. "I promise to... to try my best."\n\n`;
            else result += `"My heart beats in time with ${ppo}s." ${ps} whisper${acc}. "My pledge is absolute."\n\n`;
        }
        else if (setup.Relationships.relationship_type_with(npc))
        {
            switch (setup.Relationships.relationship_type_with(npc))
            {
                case "friend":
                    if (dominant) result += `"I, ${npc}, recognize strength in you and in our alliance." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to stand by your side, always."\n\n`;
                    else if (shy) result += `"Um... I, ${npc}, think ${ppo} is... really kind." ${ps} stammer${acc}. "I-I pledge to be a good friend, if you'll have me."\n\n`;
                    else if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, feel a kinship with you, ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I offer my unwavering support."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, feel a kinship with you." ${ps} say${acc}. "I offer you my support, always."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "rival":
                    if (dominant) result += `"I, ${npc}, acknowledge your power, but I will surpass you." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to a contest of skill, and I *will* win."\n\n`;
                    else if (confident) result += `"I, ${npc}, admire your tenacity, ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to push you to your limits, and relish the challenge."\n\n`;
                    else if (shy) result += `"I... I suppose I must challenge you." ${ps} mumble${acc}. "I pledge to... to try and win, but I don't think I'm very good."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel the strength that flows from ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "best friend":
                    if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, trust you with my life, ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I stand by your side, without question."\n\n`;
                    else if (crude) result += `"I, ${npc}, wouldn't be here without you, ${ppo}." ${ps} admit${acc}. "I pledge my loyalty, even if you're a complete mess."\n\n`;
                    else if (confident) result += `"I, ${npc}, have always known you would reach great heights." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to be there for you, no matter what."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel the kinship in ${ppo} eyes." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
                    break;
                default:
                    if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, can sense the connection with ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel that ${ppo} has potential." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to guide you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            switch (setup.people.desired_relationship(npc))
            {
                case "friend":
                    if (shy) result += `"I-I, ${npc}, um... I think ${ppo} is a... a really nice person." ${ps} say${acc} with some stuttering. "I... I pledge my friendship... if that's okay."\n\n`;
                    else if (dominant) result += `"I, ${npc}, recognize potential when I see it." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge my aid, but do not mistake it for weakness."\n\n`;
                    else if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, find comfort in ${ppo} presence." ${ps} say${acc} gently. "I pledge my sincerity and goodwill."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel that ${ppo} heart is good." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge for you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "date":
                    if (shy) result += `"I... I think ${ppo} is... really cute." ${ps} say${acc} nervously. "I... pledge to... to go on a date, if you want."\n\n`;
                    else if (confident) result += `"I, ${npc}, feel a spark with ${ppo}." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge my time and attention... and perhaps more."\n\n`;
                    else if (crude) result += `"I, ${npc}, admit that ${pps} is quite attractive." ${ps} say${acc} with a smirk. "I pledge a... memorable evening."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, can say that ${ppo} spirit is strong." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge my affections to you."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "fuckbuddy":
                    if (crude) result += `"I, ${npc}, can state that ${ppo} energy is... undeniable." ${ps} acknowledges. "I pledge to fulfill your desires, no questions asked."\n\n`;
                    else if (dominant) result += `"I, ${npc}, appreciate your... directness." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to cater to your needs, and expect the same in return."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, admit that I find you... appealing." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge a mutually enjoyable arrangement."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "rival":
                    if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, can state that ${pps} know${pacc} ${ppo} forces." ${ps} say${acc}... then, lets out a soft sigh. "I pledge to challenge you, but with respect."\n\n`;
                    else if(shy) result += `"I... I suppose I'll have to try and best you." ${ps} mumble${acc}. "I pledge to... compete, but I'm not very good."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, see you as a worthy opponent." ${ps} say${acc}. "I pledge to test your limits."\n\n`;
                    break;
                case "hatefuck":
                    if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, can assure that ${pps} know${pacc} ${ppo} forces." ${ps} say${acc} gritting ${po} teeth. "I pledge to use you, my ${sibling}... and enjoy every minute."\n\n`;
                    else if (confident) result += `"I, ${npc}, despise your very existence." ${ps} declare${acc}, pensively. "But I pledge to savor every moment of our... interaction."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, despise you... and desire you." ${ps} say${acc} with a venomous tone. "I pledge to satisfy your darkest impulse."\n\n`;
                    break;
                default:
                    if (kind) result += `"I, ${npc}, can feel that ${pps} is alright." ${ps} say${acc}, without real conviction. "I pledge... for you, my ${sibling}."\n\n`;
                    else if (dominant) result += `"I, ${npc}, will tolerate your presence." ${ps} say${acc} with a dismissive tone. "I pledge... for you."\n\n`;
                    else result += `"I, ${npc}, suppose I can offer my support." ${ps} say${acc}, with a dismissive shrug. "I pledge... well, I pledge something, I suppose."\n\n`;
            }
        }
        if (!setup.people.is_known(npc)) setup.people.become_known(npc);
    });
    console.log(result);
    return result;
}

setup.meter_matter = function(person, part)
{
    const part_desc = {
        "penis": [person.penis_descriptor(), "meter", [person["penis size"], person["penis girth"]]],
        "breast": [person.breast_descriptor(), "cup", person["breast size"]],
        "height": [person.height_descriptor(), "meter", person["height"]],
        "labia": [person.vaginalmi_descriptor(), "meter", person["vaginalmi size"]],
        "testicles": [person.scrotum_descriptor(), "meter", person["scrotum size"]],
        }
    const desc = part_desc[part][0];
    const title = part_desc[part][1];
    const value = part_desc[part][2];
    const tooltipText = setup.convert_size(part, value);
    const result = `<span title="${tooltipText}">`;
    return result;
}

setup.convert_size = function(part, value)
{
    let result = "";
    if (part == "penis")
    {
        const inch = V.optamericlock ? 2.54 : 1;
        const metric = V.optamericlock ? "inch " : "cm "
        const length = 0.0166 * value[0] + 0.4;
        const girth = 0.006 * value[1] + 6.4;
        result = Math.round((length / inch) * 10) / 10 + metric + "long, " + Math.round((girth / inch) * 10) / 10 + metric + "girth";
    }
    else if (part == "height")
    {
        const inch = V.optamericlock ? 3.281 : 1;
        const metric = V.optamericlock ? "ft " : "m "
        const height = 0.00075 * value + 1.30;
        result = Math.round((height * inch) * 100) / 100 + metric + "high";
    }
    else if (part == "breast")
    {
        const cups = ["AAA", "AA", "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"];
        const index = Math.floor((7 * value) / 1000);
        result = cups[Math.min(index, cups.length - 1)] + " cup size";
    }
    else if (part == "labia")
    {
        const inch = V.optamericlock ? 2.54 : 1;
        const metric = V.optamericlock ? "inch " : "cm "
        const length = 0.004 * value;
        result = Math.round((length / inch) * 10) / 10 + metric + "long";
    }
    else if (part == "testicles")
    {
        const inch = V.optamericlock ? 2.54 : 1;
        const metric = V.optamericlock ? "inch " : "cm "
        const length = 0.007 * value + 1;
        result = Math.round((length / inch) * 10) / 10 + metric + "long";
    }
    return result;
}

setup.unconvert_size = function(part, input) 
{
    const unit_cm = {
        inch: 2.54,
        inches: 2.54,
        in: 2.54,
        cm: 1,
        centimeter: 1,
        centimeters: 1
    };

    const unit_m = {
        foot: 0.3048,
        feet: 0.3048,
        ft: 0.3048,
        m: 1,
        meter: 1,
        meters: 1
    };
    
    const s = input.trim().toLowerCase();
    const reunit = /^(?:[ ]*)([0-9\.]+)(?:[ ]*)([a-z]+)(?:[ ]*)$/i;  
    const rerum = /^(?:[ ]*)([0-9\.]+)(?:[ ]*)$/;

    if (part == "penis size") 
    {
        const m = s.match(reunit);
        if (m) 
        {
            const value = parseFloat(m[1]);
            const unit  = m[2];

            if (unit_cm[unit] != undefined) 
            {
                const lengthcm = unit_cm[unit] * value;
                return (lengthcm - 0.4) / 0.0166;
            } 
            else 
            {
                return value;
            }
        } 
        else if (s.match(rerum)) 
        {
            return parseFloat(s.match(rerum)[1]);
        }
    } 
    else if (part == "penis girth") 
    {
        const m = s.match(reunit);
        if (m) 
        {
            const value = parseFloat(m[1]);
            const unit  = m[2];
            if (unit_cm[unit] != undefined) 
            {
                const girthcm = unit_cm[unit] * value;
                return (girthcm - 6.4) / 0.006;
            } 
            else 
            {
                return value;
            }
        } 
        else if (s.match(rerum)) 
        {
            return parseFloat(s.match(rerum)[1]);
        }
    } 
    else if (part == "height") 
    {
        const m = s.match(reunit);
        if (m) 
        {
            const value = parseFloat(m[1]);
            const unit  = m[2];
            if (unit_m[unit] != undefined) 
            {
                const heightM = unit_m[unit] * value;
                return (heightM - 130) / 0.075;
            } 
            else 
            {
                return value;
            }
        }
        else if (s.match(rerum)) 
        {
            return parseFloat(s.match(rerum)[1]);
        }
    }
    else if (part == "breast") 
    {
        const cups = ["AAA","AA","A","B","C","D","E","F"];
        const cupIndex = cups.indexOf(s.toUpperCase());
        if (cupIndex !== -1) 
        {
            return cupIndex * (1000 / (cups.length - 1));
        }
        const re = /^[ ]*([0-9]{1,4})[ ]*$/;
        if (re.test(s)) 
        {
            const [num] = s.match(re);
            return Math.max(0, Math.min(1000, Number(num)));
        }
    }
}

setup.part_indices = function(part, name, side)
{
    let indices = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < name.body_parts.length; i++)
    {
        if (name.body_parts[i] == part)
        {
            if (side)
            {
                const isRight = i % 2 == 0;
                if ((side == "right" && isRight) || (side == "left" && !isRight))
                {
                    indices.push(i);
                }
            }
            else
            {
                indices.push(i);
            }
        }
    }
    return indices;
}

setup.part_artificial = function(artificial, part, name, side = false)
{
    const index = setup.part_indices(part, name, side);
    if (!name.artificial_parts)
    {
        name.artificial_parts = {};
    }
    name.artificial_parts[index] = artificial;
}

setup.read_parts = function(name, part, side)
{
    const index = Object.keys(name.artificial_parts);
    console.log("index", index);
    if (side)
    {
    	const isright = setup.part_indices(part, name, side);
    	const isValidIndex = isright.some(v => index.includes(String(v)));
    	console.log("isright", isright);
    	if (isValidIndex && name.body_parts[isright] == part)
    	{
    		console.log("artificial_part index", name.artificial_parts[isright]);
    		return name.artificial_parts[isright];
		}
		else
		{
			console.log("body_part index", name.body_parts[isright]);
			return name.body_parts[isright];
		}
	}
	else
	{
		const isright = setup.part_indices(part, name);
    	const isValidIndex = isright.some(v => index.includes(String(v)));
    	if (name.body_parts[isright] == part)
    	{
        	return name.artificial_parts[isright];
    	}
    	else
    	{
        	return name.body_parts[isright];
    	}
	}
}

setup.change_part = function(person, oldpart, add, newpart)
{
    const parts = Array.isArray(oldpart) ? oldpart : [oldpart];

    parts.forEach(p => {
        const index = person.body_parts.indexOf(p);

        if (add)
        {
            if (newpart)
            {
                if (index !== -1)
                {
                    person.body_parts[index] = newpart;
                }
                else
                {
                    person.body_parts.push(newpart);
                }
            }
            else if (!person.body_parts.includes(p))
            {
                person.body_parts.push(p);
                console.log("Part added :", p);
            }
        }
        else
        {
            if (index !== -1)
            {
                person.body_parts.splice(index, 1);
            }
        }
    });
}

setup.memory = function(person, memory, add)
{
    let tempMemory = memory || [];

    if (add)
    {
        if (!tempMemory.includes(person))
        {
            tempMemory.push(person);
        }
    }
    else
    {
        const index = tempMemory.indexOf(person);
        if (index !== -1)
        {
            tempMemory.splice(index, 1);
        }
    }

    return tempMemory;
}

setup.memory_stats = function(person, memory, action, type, ...args)
{
    let tempMemory = memory || {};
    console.log("function has been called");

    switch (type)
    {
        case "number":
            tempMemory[person] = tempMemory[person] || 0;

            if (action === "add")
            {
                const numberAdd = args.filter(arg => typeof arg === "number");
                tempMemory[person] += numberAdd.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
            }
            else if (action === "remove")
            {
                const numberRemove = args.filter(arg => typeof arg === "number");
                let totalRemove = numberRemove.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
                tempMemory[person] = Math.max(tempMemory[person] - totalRemove, 0);
            }
            else if (action === "reset")
            {
                tempMemory[person] = 0;
            }
            break;

        case "clothing":
            tempMemory[person] = tempMemory[person] || [];

            if (action === "add")
            {
                const itemsToAdd = args.filter(arg => typeof arg === "string");
                tempMemory[person].push(...itemsToAdd);
            }
            else if (action === "remove")
            {
                const itemsToRemove = args.filter(arg => typeof arg === "string");
                itemsToRemove.forEach(item =>
                {
                    const index = tempMemory[person].indexOf(item);
                    if (index !== -1)
                    {
                        tempMemory[person].splice(index, 1);
                    }
                });
            }
            else if (action === "reset")
            {
                tempMemory[person] = [];
            }
            break;
    }

    return tempMemory;
}

setup.memory_stats_global = function(memory, amt)
{

    let tempMemory = memory || {};

    const entryMemory = Object.entries(tempMemory);

    for (const [person, actualMemory] of entryMemory)
    {
        if (typeof actualMemory === "number")
        {
        tempMemory[person] -= amt;
        }

        if (tempMemory[person] <= 0)
        {
            delete tempMemory[person];
        }
    }

    return tempMemory;
}

setup.memory_stats_amt = function(person, memory, amt)
{
    if (typeof memory[person] === "undefined")
    {
        memory[person] = 0;
    }
    memory[person] += amt;

    memory[person] = Math.min(1000, Math.max(0, memory[person]));
}

setup.get_memory_stats = function(person, memory, type = number)
{
    const value = memory[person];

    if (value !== undefined)
    {
        if (type === "number")
        {
            return typeof value === "number" ? value : 0;
        }
        else if (type === "clothing")
        {
            return Array.isArray(value) ? value : [];
        }
    }

    switch(type) {
        case "number":
            return 0;
        case "clothing":
            return [];
        default:
            console.error("Unexpected type. Returning default for 'number'.");
            return 0;
    }
}

setup.cheat_accusation = function(target)
{
    const name = Array.isArray(target) ? target : [target];
    const sexMemory = Object.keys(V.sexmemory);
    let result = [];
    for (const key of sexMemory)
    {
        if (name.includes(key))
        {
            const subkeys = Object.keys(V.sexmemory[key]);
            result.push(...subkeys);
        }
    }
    return result;
}

setup.slipchance = function(person, part)
{
    if (V.optsliptoys)
    {
        for (const toy in person.sextoysuse)
        {
            if (person.sextoysuse[toy] == part && !person.wearing_underwear())
            {
                const slipvalue = toy.includes("egg") ? 0.8 : toy.includes("plug") ? 0.999 : 0.4;
                return Math.random() > slipvalue;
            }
        }
    }
    return false;
}

setup.tearing = function(doer, target, part)
{
    let tearing = 0;
    if (V.opttearing)
    {
        let dildotype = false;
        let dildosize = 0;
        if (target.is_pc)
        {
            V.pcneeds["LubricatedV"] = target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"];
            V.pcneeds["LubricatedA"] = target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"];
            V.pcneeds["LubricatedP"] = target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"];
        }
        let lube = part == "vagina" ? target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] : target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"];
        if (lube <= 0) lube = 1;

        if (doer.ongoing_penetration()?.[0]?.toy || setup.sexacts[doer.attempted_penetration?.sexact?.toys])
        {
            dildotype = doer.ongoing_penetration()[0].toy.item;
            dildosize += dildotype.includes("extra") ? 1200 : dildotype.includes("large") ? 800 : dildotype.includes("slender") ? 400 : dildotype.includes("tentacle") ? 700 : dildotype.includes("werewolf") ? 1100 : dildotype.includes("centaur") ? 1500 : dildotype.includes("dragon") ? 1800 : 0;
        }
        const penetrate = doer.ongoing_penetration()?.[0] ? 10 : 1;

        if (part == "vagina")
        {
            if (target.is_pc) V.pcneeds["Vaginatightness"] = target.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"];
            let vaginatight = target.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"];
            const penisgirth = dildotype ? dildosize : doer.has_part("penis") ? Math.max(0, (doer["penis girth"] - (target.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"] / 500))) : 0;

            if (vaginatight  < penisgirth || lube < penisgirth)
            {
                let result = Math.abs(penisgirth - vaginatight);
                let tightness = 1;
                if (target.has_part("hymen"))
                {
                    const hymenForm = target.is_pc ? V.pc.genetic[0][11] : target["hymen form"];
                    tightness = setup.hymen_form[hymenForm];
                    if (penetrate == 10)
                    {
                        setup.change_part(target, "hymen");
                        setup.change_part(target, "teared hymen", true);
                    }
                }
                tearing = (result * tightness) / lube * penetrate;
                target.add_vaginatightness(tearing);
                target.add_pain(tearing);
            }
        }
        else if (part == "anus")
        {
            if (target.is_pc) V.pcneeds["Anustightness"] = target.fleeting_stats["anustightness"];
            let anustight = target.fleeting_stats["anustightness"];
            const penisgirth = dildotype ? dildosize : doer.has_part("penis") ? doer["penis girth"] : 0;

            if (anustight  < penisgirth || lube < penisgirth)
            {
                let result = Math.abs(penisgirth - anustight);
                tearing = result / lube * penetrate;
                target.add_pain(tearing);
                target.add_anustightness(tearing);
                console.log("anus tearing value :", tearing);
            }
        }
        console.log("Doer :", doer);
        console.log("Target :", target);
        console.log("Part :", part);
        target.add_tearness(tearing);
    }
    else
    {
        if (target.is_pc && part == "vagina" && target.has_part("hymen"))
        {
            setup.change_part(target, "hymen");
            setup.change_part(target, "teared hymen", true);
        }
    }
    return part == "anus" ? tearing * 2 : tearing;
}

setup.bits_interaction = function(doer, target, part)
{
    V.interBits = {};
    if (doer.is_pc)
    {
        V.interBits = {1: part};
    }
    else if (target.is_pc)
    {
        V.interBits = {2: part};
    }
    console.log("Penetrator :", doer.name);
    console.log("Penetrated :", target.name);
}

setup.edging = function(doer, target, part)
{
    if (target.edged < 0 || !target.edged)
    {
        target.edged = 0;
    }
    if (V.optedging)
    {
        if (target.is_pc) target.fleeting_stats["arousal"] = V.pcneeds["Arousal"];
        if (target.fleeting_stats["arousal"] >= 950)
        {
            const willpower = target.is_pc ? ((setup.Needs.get_need("Release") / 100) - target.skill_level("Willpower")) : 5;
            const skillstimulation = (part == "anus" ? doer.skill_level("Anal") : part == "vagina" ? doer.skill_level("Vaginal") : part == "mouth" ? doer.skill_level("Oral") : part == "hand" ? doer.skill_level("Hand") : 0);
            const organstimulation = (part == "anus" ? target.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] / 100 : part == "vagina" ? target.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] / 100 : 0);
            const threshold = willpower + skillstimulation + target.edged - organstimulation;
            const ratio = threshold >= 10 ? 0.9 : threshold > 5 ? 0.5 : threshold > 1 ? 0.2 : 0;
            let success = Math.random() > ratio;
            if (success)
            {
                if (ratio > 0.2 && success > 0.6)
                {
                    target.ruined_orgasm()
                    if (!target.Rorgasm)
                    {
                        target.Rorgasm = true;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        target.add_arousal(-200);
                        target.edged += 1;
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    target.add_arousal(-200);
                    target.edged += 1;
                }
            }
            else
            {
                target.fleeting_stats["arousal"] = 1050;
                target.edged = 0;
            }
            console.log("willpower :", willpower);
            console.log("skillstimulation :", skillstimulation);
            console.log("organstimulation :", organstimulation);
            console.log("threshold :", threshold);
            console.log("ratio :", ratio);
            console.log("Edged :", target.edged, "Target :", target.name, "By :", doer.name);
            console.log("success :", success);
        }
        else
        {
            console.log("Not enought arousal.");
        }
    }
}

setup.acts_triage = function(actsname, part)
{
    if (!(V.pc.sexacts)) V.pc.sexacts = {};
    let result = [];
    for (const act of actsname)
    {
        if (setup.sexacts[act])
        {
            const subject = setup.sexacts[act]["subject parts"][0];
            if ((!V.pc.sexacts[part] || !V.pc.sexacts[part].includes(act)) && part.includes(subject)) result.push(act);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

setup.acts_remove = function(actsname, part)
{
    if (!(V.pc.sexacts)) V.pc.sexacts = {};
    let result = [];
    for (const act of actsname)
    {
        if (setup.sexacts[act])
        {
            const subject = setup.sexacts[act]["subject parts"][0];
            if (!part.includes(subject)) result.push(act);
        }
    }
    
    return result;
}

setup.acts_keep = function(actsname, action)
{
    if (!(V.pc.sexacts)) V.pc.sexacts = {};
    let result = [];
    for (const act of actsname)
    {
        if (action.includesAny(act)) result.push(act);
    }
    return result;
}

setup.narrative_insertion = function(memory, personMemory = null)
{
    const narName = null;

    if (personMemory === null)
    {
        for (const key in memory)
        {
            if (memory.hasOwnProperty(key))
            {
                if (V.peopleatlocation.includes(key))
                {
                    narName = key;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    else
    {
        const personMemoryArray = Array.isArray(personMemory) ? personMemory : [personMemory];

        for (const key of V.peopleatlocation)
        {
            const person = V.people[key];
            if (person && person[memory] !== undefined)
            {
                if (personMemoryArray.includes(person[memory]))
                {
                    narName = key;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    return narName;
}

setup.checkAO = function(Entry, Def, Person, Array, Object)
{
    const tempArray = Person[Array];
    const tempObject = setup[Object];

    for (const object of tempArray)
    {
        const check = tempObject[object];
        if (check && check[Def] === Entry)
        {
            return { result: true, value: object };
        }
    }

    return { result: false, value: null };
}

setup.checkArrayChange = function(arr, onChange) 
{
    return new Proxy(arr, {
        set(target, prop, value) 
        {
            target[prop] = value;
            if (prop !== "length") onChange(target);
            return true;
        },
        deleteProperty(target, prop) 
        {
            delete target[prop];
            onChange(target);
            return true;
        }
    });
}

setup.sensitivity = function(name)
{
    if (!name.erogenous)
        name.erogenous = {};

    const sensitivityLabels = [
        "Glans",
        "Shaft",
        "Testicles",
        "Frenelum",
        "Clitoral",
        "Vaginal",
        "Urinary Meatus",
        "Outer Lips",
        "Anal",
        "Navel",
        "Breasts",
        "Nipples"
    ];

    const defaultValue = 1;

    sensitivityLabels.forEach(label => {
        const labelElement = setup.label(label);
        if (labelElement)
        {
            const buttonContainer = labelElement.nextElementSibling;
            let hasButtons = false;

            if (buttonContainer && buttonContainer.classList.contains('buttons-container'))
            {
                const buttons = buttonContainer.querySelectorAll('.btn');
                hasButtons = buttons.length > 0;

                const activeButton = buttonContainer.querySelector('.btn.active');
                if (activeButton)
                {
                    const value = parseFloat(activeButton.getAttribute('data-value'));
                    name.erogenous[label] = isNaN(value) ? null : value;
                }
                else
                {
                    name.erogenous[label] = hasButtons ? defaultValue : null;
                }
            }
            else
            {
                name.erogenous[label] = defaultValue;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            name.erogenous[label] = null;
        }
    });

    return name.erogenous;
}

setup.label = function(Label)
{
    const labels = document.querySelectorAll('.sensitivity-label');
    for (const label of labels)
    {
        if (label.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() == Label.trim().toLowerCase())
        {
            return label;
        }
    }
    return 1;
}

setup.NPC_Needs = function(name)
{
    const needGen = {"Food": 1000, "Rest": 1000, "Relaxation": 1000, "Attention": 1000, "Bladder": 1000, "Hygiene": 1000, "Composure": 1000, "Release": 1000};
    const date = setup.Time.date();
    let rng = setup.newRNG(name + date);
    let finalrng = rng.random() > 0.9 ? -200 : rng.random() > 0.7 ? 350 : rng.random() > 0.5 ? -500 : rng.random() > 0.3 ? 150 : rng.random() > 0.1 ? -350 : 0;
    const time = (V.hour * 100) + V.minute;
    Object.keys(needGen).forEach(key => {
        switch(key)
        {
            case "Food":
                needGen[key] -= ((V.hour >= 7 && V.hour <= 8) || (V.hour >= 11 && V.hour <= 12) || (V.hour >= 17 && V.hour <= 18)) ? 0 : finalrng;
                break;
            case "Rest":
                needGen[key] -= (V.hour >= 7 && V.hour <= 22) ? 900 - (time * 0.8) + finalrng : 0;
                break;
            case "Relaxation":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            case "Attention":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            case "Bladder":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            case "Hygiene":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            case "Composure":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            case "Release":
                needGen[key] -= finalrng - (time * 0.8);
                break;
            default:
                needGen[key] = 1000;
        }
    });
    return needGen;
}

setup.NPC_Gen = function(rng, rng2, pdata, trait_association, person)
{
    let genetic = [[]];

    let ethnicity = pdata["ethnicity"] ?? rng.randomchoice(Object.keys(setup.trait_associations[rng.randomrelfreq(setup.trait_association_rate)]));
    let ethnicitybis = rng2.randomchoice(Object.keys(setup.trait_associations[rng.randomrelfreq(setup.trait_association_rate)]));
    let half = rng.random() > 0.75 ? 1 : 0;
    let u = rng.random();
    
    let tan = trait_association["tan colors"][0] + (trait_association["tan colors"][1] - trait_association["tan colors"][0]) * (1 - 4 * (u - 0.5) * (u - 0.5));
    let yellow = trait_association["yellow colors"][0] + (trait_association["yellow colors"][1] - trait_association["yellow colors"][0]) * (1 - 4 * (u - 0.5) * (u - 0.5));
    let skin = "";
    let eye = rng.randomchoice(trait_association["eye colors"]);
    let hair = rng.randomchoice(trait_association["hair colors"]);
    let areola = rng2.randomchoice(trait_association["areola colors"]);
    let nipple = rng2.randomrelfreq(setup.nipple_types);
    let hormonal = trait_association["hormonal"][0] + (trait_association["hormonal"][1] - trait_association["hormonal"][0]) * (1 - 4 * (u - 0.5) * (u - 0.5));
    let hymen = rng2.randomchoice(Object.keys(setup.hymen_form));
    let vaginalmi = rng2.randomchoice(trait_association["vaginalmi colors"]);
    
    const values = [
        ethnicity,
        half,
        half ? ethnicitybis : 0,
        tan,
        yellow,
        skin,
        eye,
        hair,
        areola,
        nipple,
        hormonal,
        hymen,
        vaginalmi,
        person["aerola size"],
        person["breast size"],
        person["vaginalmi size"],
        person["vaginalma size"],
        person["penis size"],
        person["penis girth"],
        person["scrotum size"],
        person["ass size"],
        person["hips size"],
        person["height"],
    ];
    
    for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) 
    {
        genetic[0].push(values[i] ?? null);
    }
    return genetic;
}

setup.partner_index = function(name, object)
{
    window[name] = object;
}

setup.identify = function(person)
{
    const result = person.name_known && !person.is_anonymous() ? person.firstname() : person.ps == "he" ? "man" : person.ps == "she" ? "woman" : "person";
    return result;
}

setup.mirror = function(name, type, value)
{
    if (V.optcrossdressing)
    {
        if (value)
        {
            const masc = setup.masculinityIndicator(name, type);
            return Array.isArray(masc) ? masc : [masc];
        }
        else
        {
            return Object.keys(name.masculinity_value[type]);
        }
    }
    else
    {
        return ["N/A"];
    }
}

setup.skin_color = function(tan, yellow)
{
    const tanstart = { r: 232, g: 208, b: 204 };
    const tanend = { r: 75, g: 54, b: 33 };
    const yellowstart = { r: 244, g: 255, b: 255 };
    const yellowend = { r: 79, g: 68, b: 34 };
  
    const norm = v => Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v / 1000));

    const lerp = (c1, c2, t) => Math.round(c1 + t * (c2 - c1));

    const tanrgb = v => ({
        r: lerp(tanstart.r, tanend.r, norm(v)),
        g: lerp(tanstart.g, tanend.g, norm(v)),
        b: lerp(tanstart.b, tanend.b, norm(v))
    });
  
    const yellowrgb = v => ({
        r: lerp(yellowstart.r, yellowend.r, norm(v)),
        g: lerp(yellowstart.g, yellowend.g, norm(v)),
        b: lerp(yellowstart.b, yellowend.b, norm(v))
    });

    const colortan = tanrgb(tan);
    const coloryellow = yellowrgb(yellow);

    const overlay = (b, s) => b * s;

    const roverlay = overlay(colortan.r / 255, coloryellow.r / 255);
    const goverlay = overlay(colortan.g / 255, coloryellow.g / 255);
    const boverlay = overlay(colortan.b / 255, coloryellow.b / 255);

    const int = (c) => Math.round(c * 255);
    const baseRGB = {
        r: int(roverlay),
        g: int(goverlay),
        b: int(boverlay)
    };

    const darkRGB = {
        r: Math.max(0, baseRGB.r - 35),
        g: Math.max(0, baseRGB.g - 40),
        b: Math.max(0, baseRGB.b - 40)
    };

    const hex = (num) => num.toString(16).padStart(2, "0");

    const base   = `#${hex(baseRGB.r)}${hex(baseRGB.g)}${hex(baseRGB.b)}`;
    const darken = `#${hex(darkRGB.r)}${hex(darkRGB.g)}${hex(darkRGB.b)}`;

    return [base, darken];
}

setup.set_skin = function(skin, gradient) 
{
    const stop1 = document.getElementById("stop405");
    const stop2 = document.getElementById("stop406");
    if (stop1) stop1.setAttribute("stop-color", skin);
    if (stop2) stop2.setAttribute("stop-color", gradient);
}

setup.masculinity_calculation = function(name)
{
    let result = 0;
    if (V.optcrossdressing)
    {
        name.masculinity_value = { parts: {}, clothing: {}, stands: {} };
        name.get_masculinity();
        setup.masculinity_parts(name);
        setup.masculinity_stand(name);
        const masc = Object.values(name.masculinity_value.parts).concat(Object.values(name.masculinity_value.clothing).concat(Object.values(name.masculinity_value.stands)));
        masc.forEach(mascAdd => {
            result += mascAdd;
        });
        result += setup.masculinity_mid_calculation(name, result);
        console.log("final calculation :", result);
    }
    return result;
}

setup.masculinity_mid_calculation = function(name, value)
{
    let result = 0;
    const mons = name["pubis mons"] ? (Math.floor(name["pubis mons"] / 200)) : 1;
    if (name.pants_equiv() && name.is_skintight(name.pants_equiv()) && !name.has_part("penis"))
    {
        if (value > 0) result += (1 * mons);
        else result += (-1 * mons);
    }
    return result;
}

setup.dynamic_pronouns = function(name)
{
    let pname;
    let proname;
    if (typeof name != "object" && name != "PC")
    {
        pname = new Person({person: name});
    }
    else
    {
        pname = name;
    }

    const cgender = pname.choosedgender == "female" ? "female" : pname.choosedgender == "male" ? "male" : pname.choosedgender == "nonbinary" ? "nonbinary" : false;
    const lmasc = setup.masculinity_calculation(pname);
    const lgender = lmasc <= -1 ? "female" : lmasc >= 1 ? "male" : "nonbinary";
    if (cgender && ((!pname.is_pc && pname.gender_known) || (V.pc.knowpcpronouns.includes(pname.person))))
    {
        proname = cgender;
    }
    else
    {
        proname = lgender;
    }
    return proname;
}

setup.choice_matter = function(name, stand, index)
{
    if (!name.masculinity_index) name.masculinity_index = [];
    if (name.masculinity_index[index] == stand)
    {
        name.masculinity_index[index] = "normal";
    }
    else
    {
        name.masculinity_index[index] = stand;
    }
}

setup.masculinity_stand = function(name)
{
    if (!name.masculinity_index)
        name.masculinity_index = [];

    const masc = name.masculinity_value.stands;
    const settings = [
        {
            index: 0,
            type: "voice",
            values: {
                "deep": 2,
                "resonant": 1,
                "soft": -1,
                "high pitched": -2
            }
        },
        {
            index: 1,
            type: "walk",
            values: {
                "assertive": 2,
                "confident": 1,
                "sassy": -1,
                "seductive": -2
            }
        },
        {
            index: 2,
            type: "look",
            values: {
                "intense": 2,
                "piercing": 1,
                "soft": -1,
                "alluring": -2
            }
        },
        {
            index: 3,
            type: "posture",
            values: {
                "conqueror": 2,
                "dominant": 1,
                "gentle": -1,
                "seductive": -2
            }
        }
    ];

    settings.forEach(config => {
        const currentValue = name.masculinity_index[config.index] || "normal";
        const key = currentValue + " " + config.type;
        masc[key] = config.values[currentValue] || 0;
    });
}

setup.masculinity_parts = function(name)
{
    let masc = name.masculinity_value.parts;

    if (name.grows_beard == true && name.beard_style !== "shaved")
    {
        const beardValue = 3
        const beardkey = name.beard_style + " beard";
        masc[beardkey] = beardValue;
    }
    else
    {
        const beardValue = 0
        const beardkey = "no beard";
        masc[beardkey] = beardValue;
    }


    const hairLength = {
        "ear-length": 0,
        "short": 1,
        "very short": 2,
        "close-cropped": 2
    };
    const hairAdjustment = hairLength[name["hair length"]] || -2;
    const hairkey = name["hair length"] + " hair";
    masc[hairkey] = hairAdjustment;

    if (name.pants_equiv() && name.is_skintight(name.pants_equiv()) || !name.is_part_covered("penis") || !name.is_part_covered("vagina") || name.bulge_visible())
    {
        if (name.has_part("penis"))
        {
            const genitalsSize = name["penis size"];
            let genitalsValue = genitalsSize >= 750 ? 4 : genitalsSize >= 250 ? 3 : 2;
            if (name.bulge_visible())
            {
                genitalsValue += 1;
            }
            const peniskey = name.penis_descriptor() + " penis";
            masc[peniskey] = genitalsValue;
        }
        else
        {
            const genitalsSize = name["vaginalma size"];
            const genitalsValue = genitalsSize >= 750 ? -4 : genitalsSize >= 250 ? -3 : -2;
            const vulvakey = name.vaginalma_descriptor() + " vulva";
            masc[vulvakey] = genitalsValue;
        }
    }
    else
    {
        masc.genitals = 0;
    }

    const hipsSize = name["hips size"];
    const hipsValue = hipsSize < 500 ? 1 : hipsSize > 750 ? -3 : hipsSize >= 500 ? -2 : 0;
    const hipskey = name.hips_descriptor() + " hips";
    masc[hipskey] = hipsValue;

    const musclekey = name.physique_descriptor() + " muscle";
    masc[musclekey] = 0;
    if (name.has_visible_muscles(false))
    {
        const muscleSize = name["muscle"];
        const muscleValue = muscleSize >= 800 ? 4 : muscleSize >= 600 ? 2 : 0;
        masc[musclekey] = muscleValue;
    }

    if (name.has_part("breasts"))
    {
        const breastSize = name["breast size"];
        const breastValue = breastSize > 300 ? Math.floor((breastSize / -100) + 2) : Math.floor((breastSize / -100) + 3);
        const breastkey = name.breast_descriptor() + " breasts";
        masc[breastkey] = breastValue;
    }
    else
    {
        const breastValue = 2;
        masc.chest = breastValue;
    }
}

setup.masculinityIndicator = function(target, type)
{
    if (type)
    {
        const valuesArray = Object.values(target.masculinity_value[type]);
        return valuesArray.map(value => setup.masculinityColor(value));
    }
    else
    {
        const masculinityValue = target.masculinity || 0;
        return setup.masculinityColor(masculinityValue);
    }
}

setup.masculinityColor = function(value)
{
    if (value == 0)
    {
        if (V.customColors)
        {
            const type = "nonbinary";
            const color = setup.get_color(type);
            return `<span style="color: ${color}">A</span>`;
        }
        else
        {
            return `<span class="neutral">A</span>`;
        }
    }
    else
    {
        const absoluteValue = Math.abs(value);
        let plusSigns = "";
        for (let i = 0; i < absoluteValue; i++)
        {
            plusSigns += "+";
        }
        if (V.customColors)
        {
            const type = value > 0 ? "male" : "female";
            const color = setup.get_color(type);
            return `<span style="color: ${color}">${plusSigns}</span>`;
        }
        else
        {
            const className = value > 0 ? "masculine" : "feminine";
            return `<span class="${className}">${plusSigns}</span>`;
        }
    }
}

setup.cum_spurt = function(part, skill, manual)
{
    let spurt;
    let reduction = 0;
    if (part == "vagina")
    {
        spurt = V.pc.cumInsideVagina;
    }
    if (part == "anus")
    {
        spurt = V.pc.cumInsideAnus;
    }

    if (manual)
    {
        reduction += spurt * manual;
    }
    else
    {
        reduction += spurt * (0.7 - (0.06 * (10 - V.pc.skillcheck(skill))));
    }
    if (part == "vagina")
    {
        V.pc.cumInsideVagina -= reduction;
    }
    if (part == "anus")
    {
        V.pc.cumInsideAnus -= reduction;
    }
    console.log("Spurt :", reduction);
    return reduction;
}

setup.cum_regen = function()
{
    if (V.pc.has_part("penis"))
    {
        const scrotumSize = V.pc["scrotum size"];
        let originalCum = scrotumSize >= 900 ? 1000 : scrotumSize >= 750 ? 800 : scrotumSize >= 600 ? 600 : scrotumSize >= 450 ? 400 : scrotumSize >= 300 ? 200 : 100;

        let cumBoost = V.pc.cumBoost || 0;

        if (V.pc.cum === 0)
        {
            if (cumBoost < 20)
            {
                cumBoost++;
                V.pc.cumBoost = cumBoost;
            }
        }

        let cumMax = originalCum + (cumBoost * 10);

        if (V.pc.cum < cumMax)
        {
            V.pc.cum += Math.min(100, cumMax - V.pc.cum);
        }
    }
}

setup.cum_calculation = function(name, spew, minutes = 1)
{
    if (name.has_part("penis"))
    {
        const scrotumSize = name["scrotum size"];

        if (!name.cum && name.has_part("balls"))
        {
            if (scrotumSize >= 900)
            {
                name.cum = 1000;
            }
            else if (scrotumSize >= 750)
            {
                name.cum = 800;
            }
            else if (scrotumSize >= 600)
            {
                name.cum = 600;
            }
            else if (scrotumSize >= 450)
            {
                name.cum = 400;
            }
            else if (scrotumSize >= 300)
            {
                name.cum = 200;
            }
            else
            {
                name.cum = 100;
            }
        }

        if (spew)
        {
            const beforeCum = name.cum;
            const quantity = Math.min(name.fleeting_stats["satisfaction"] * 0.1, 100);
            name.cum = Math.max(name.cum - quantity, 0);

            const result = beforeCum - name.cum;
            console.log("Spewer :", name, "Quantity :", result);
            return result;
        }
    }
    let leak = 0;

    if (name.has_part("vagina"))
    {
    	const vaginatight = name.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] < 250 ? 0.2 : name.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] < 500 ? 1.2 : name.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] < 750 ? 1.5 : 1.7;
    	if (!name.cumInsideVagina)
        {
            name.cumInsideVagina = 0;
        }
        if (name.cumInsideVagina > 0)
        {
        	let vaginaLeak = name.cumInsideVagina;
        	if (vaginaLeak > 200)
        	{
            	vaginaLeak = 100;
			}
			else if (vaginaLeak > 50)
        	{
            	vaginaLeak *= 0.05;
			}
			else
        	{
            	vaginaLeak *= 0.01;
			}
			leak += (vaginaLeak * vaginatight * minutes);
			name.cumInsideVagina -= Math.abs(leak);
			console.log("Semen in your vagina:", name.cumInsideVagina);
		}
    }

    if (!name.cumInsideAnus)
    {
        name.cumInsideAnus = 0;
    }
    if (name.cumInsideAnus > 0)
    {
		const anustight = name.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] < 250 ? 0.2 : name.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] < 500 ? 1.2 : name.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] < 750 ? 1.5 : 1.7;
    	let anusLeak = name.cumInsideAnus;
    	if (anusLeak > 400)
    	{
        	anusLeak = 150;
    	}
    	else if (anusLeak > 50)
    	{
    	    anusLeak *= 0.05;
		}
    	else
    	{
        	anusLeak *= 0.01;
    	}
    	leak += anusLeak;
		name.cumInsideAnus -= Math.abs(leak * anustight * minutes);
		console.log("Semen in your anus:", name.cumInsideAnus);
	}

    return leak;
}

setup.cum_inside = function(target, doer)
{
    const spew = setup.cum_calculation(doer, true);

    if (target.has_part("vagina") && target.creampie_this_encounter)
    {
        if (!target.cumInsideVagina)
            target.cumInsideVagina = 0;

        target.cumInsideVagina += spew;
        console.log("Target :", target, "Quantity :", spew);
    }
    if (target.anal_creampie_this_encounter)
    {
        if (!target.cumInsideAnus)
            target.cumInsideAnus = 0;

        target.cumInsideAnus += spew;
        console.log("Target :", target, "Quantity :", spew);
    }
}

setup.change_clothes = function(Person, Outfit)
{
    Person.clothes = [];
    let clothes = setup.build_outfit(Person.gender, Person.body_parts, Outfit, setup.newRNG());
    Person.clothes = clothes;
}

setup.resist = function(aggressor)
{
    const aggobj = new Person({person: aggressor});
    const aggheight = aggobj.height;
    const aggsize = aggobj.plumpness;
    const aggmuscle = aggobj.muscle;
    let factor = 0;
    let gender = 0;
    if (V.optsexualdism)
    {
        if ((V.pc.has_part("vagina") || V.pcgender != "hermaphrodite (male appearance)") && aggobj.has_part("penis"))
        {
            gender = 0.1;
        }
        else if ((V.pc.has_part("penis") || V.pcgender != "hermaphrodite (female appearance)") && !aggobj.has_part("penis"))
        {
            gender = -0.1;
        }
    }
    if (V.pc.height < aggheight) factor += 0.33 + gender;
    if (V.pc.plumpness < aggsize) factor += 0.33 + gender;
    if (V.pc.muscle < aggmuscle) factor += 0.33 + gender;
    
    return Math.random() < factor;
}

setup.keep_only = function(value)
{
    const people = V.peopleatlocation;
    let retval = [];
    if (value == "male")
    {
        for (const person of people)
        {
            if (setup.people.is_masc(person, true)) retval.push(person);
        }
    }
    else if (value == "female")
    {
        for (const person of people)
        {
            if (setup.people.is_femme(person, true)) retval.push(person);
        }
    }
    else if (value == "QuickieBurger")
    {
        for (const person of people)
        {
            if (setup.people.get_person(person).job == "QuickieBurger") retval.push(person);
        }
    }
    V.peopleatlocation = retval;
}

setup.change_roommate = function(person)
{
    if (V.people[person].type !== "student")
    {
        return null;
    }

    const currentRoommate = V.people[person].roommate;
    const isMutualCurrent = (V.people[currentRoommate].roommate === person);
    const pcCurrentRoommate = V.pcroommate;

    try
    {
        V.people[person].roommate = "PC";
        V.people[currentRoommate].roommate = pcCurrentRoommate;
        V.people[pcCurrentRoommate].roommate = currentRoommate;
        V.pcroommate = person;
    }
    catch (error)
    {
        return null;
    }
    return true;
}

setup.path_calcul = function(start, end)
{
    const queue = [[start]];
    const visited = new Set([start]);

    while (queue.length)
    {
        const path   = queue.shift();
        const nodeId = path[path.length-1];

        if (nodeId == end) return path;

        const exits = setup.Maps.Campus.nodes[nodeId].exits;
        for (const dir in exits)
        {
            const nextNode = exits[dir];
            if (!visited.has(nextNode))
            {
                visited.add(nextNode);
                queue.push([...path, nextNode]);
            }
        }
    }
    return null;
}

setup.schedule = function()
{
    const day = V.day;
    for (const person of Object.keys(V.people))
    {
        let FinaleSchedule = {};
        console.log(person);
        console.log(FinaleSchedule);
        if (setup.School.classes_today() && V.people[person].type == "student")
        {
            console.log(person);
            console.log(V.people[person]);
            const Acourses = V.people[person].courses || [];
            const Asports  = V.people[person].sports  || [];
            const ACS = [...Acourses, ...Asports];
            for (const courses of ACS)
            {
                const coursehour = setup.School.is_class_hour(courses);
                console.log(courses);
                if (!coursehour) continue;
                let courseplace = setup.School.majors[setup.School.courses[courses].major].location;
                FinaleSchedule[+coursehour[0]] = {};
                FinaleSchedule[coursehour[0]][0] = courseplace;
                FinaleSchedule[+coursehour[0] + +coursehour[1]] = {};
                FinaleSchedule[coursehour[0] + coursehour[1]][0] = courseplace;
                console.log(FinaleSchedule);
            }
        }
        if (V.people[person].job)
        {
            for (const job of V.people[person].job)
            {
                if (!setup.School.classes_today() || V.people[person].type != "student")
                {
                    if (job == "QuickieBurger")
                    {
                        const jobpath = setup.Maps.QuickieBurger;
                    }
                    if (job == "River Rat")
                    {
                        const jobpath = setup.Maps.RiverRat;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        for (const nightlife of V.people[person].nightlife)
        {

        }
        if (!V.people[person].residence)
        {
            const residencepath = setup.Maps.ResidenceHallT;
        }
        else
        {
            const residence = V.people[person].residence;
            if (residence == "Chicory Hall")
            {
                const residencepath = setup.Maps.ResidenceHall;
            }
            else if (residence == "Helleborine Hall")
            {
                const residencepath = setup.Maps.ResidenceHallH;
            }
            else if (residence == "Trillium Hall")
            {
                const residencepath = setup.Maps.ResidenceHallT;
            }
            else
            {
                const residencepath = setup.Maps.ResidenceHallT;
            }
        }
        V.people[person].locschedule = FinaleSchedule;
    }
    let path = setup.path_calcul();
}

setup.season_temp = function () 
{
    const seasons = setup.Weather.blocks;
    const stats = {
        winter: { sumHigh: 0, sumLow: 0, sumPrecip: 0, count: 0 },
        summer: { sumHigh: 0, sumLow: 0, sumPrecip: 0, count: 0 }
    };
    for (const season_month in seasons) 
    {
        const month = seasons[season_month];

        const saison = month.season;
        if (saison == "winter" || saison == "summer") 
        {
            const s = stats[saison];
            s.sumHigh += month.avgHigh;
            s.sumLow += month.avgLow;
            s.sumPrecip += month.avgPrecip;
            s.count++;
        }
    }
    const result = {};
    for (const saison of ["winter", "summer"]) 
    {
        const stat = stats[saison];
        result[saison] = {
            avgHigh: stat.sumHigh / stat.count,
            avgLow: stat.sumLow / stat.count,
            avgPrecip: stat.sumPrecip / stat.count,
            avgDiff: (stat.sumHigh / stat.count) - (stat.sumLow / stat.count),
        };
    }
    return result;
}

setup.wind_speed = function(minutes)
{
    const weatherWindBase = V.weather.wind ? V.weather.wind : 0.333;
    const sinPeriod = 60 * 60;
    const timeStep = 60;
    let elapsed = V.hour * timeStep;

    const sinComp = Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * elapsed / sinPeriod);
    const noise = Math.random(0, 0.2);
    const speed = Math.max(0, weatherWindBase + sinComp + noise);
    return speed;
}

setup.heat_cover = function()
{
    const bodySurface = {
        "chest": 0.06,
        "stomach": 0.08,
        "back": 0.14,
        "wrist": 0.005,
        "forearm": 0.025,
        "upper arm": 0.035,
        "hand": 0.015,
        "neck": 0.01,
        "head": 0.08,
        "face": 0.04,
        "mouth": 0.005,
        "shoulder": 0.02,
        "waist": 0.01,
        "hip": 0.01,
        "thigh": 0.045,
        "crotch": 0.01,
        "calf": 0.02,
        "ankle": 0.0025,
        "foot": 0.005,
        "butt": 0.04,
        "breast": 0.08,
        "anus": 0.0002,
        "nipples": 0.0002,
        "penis": 0.003,
        "balls": 0.003,
        "outer lips": 0.003,
        "urinary meatus": 0,
        "clitoris": 0.00005,
        "hymen": 0
    };
    let avgCover = 0;
    let occupiedPart = [];
    for (const item in V.pc.sort_clothing_by_layer(V.pc.clothes))
    {
        let titem = V.pc.sort_clothing_by_layer(V.pc.clothes)[item].item;
        let cItem = new ClothingItem(titem);
        let covers = cItem.get_archetype_prop("covers");
        for (const [part, fraction] of Object.entries(bodySurface))
        {
            const nb = covers.reduce((acc, p) => (p == part ? acc + 1 : acc), 0);
            if (nb > 0 && !occupiedPart.includes(part)) 
            {
                avgCover += fraction * nb;
                occupiedPart.push(part);
            }
        }
    }
    return avgCover;
}

if (!("storage" in setup)) setup.storage = {};

setup.storage.displace = function(place, item, oldplace)
{
    if (!setup.storage[place]) setup.storage[place] = [];
}

setup.get_tooltip_ingredients = function(ingredient)
{
    const ing = setup.ingredient[ingredient.name];
    const effects = ing.effects;
    const purity = ingredient.purity || [];
    const parts = [];
    const negateMap = {
        heat: "cool",
        sleep: "wake",
        painful: "antalgic",
        aphrodisiac: "anaphrodisiac",
        satiate: "hungry",
        tasty: "untastier",
    };

    for (let i = 0; i < Object.keys(effects).length; i++)
    {
        const eff = Object.keys(effects)[i];
        const lvl = effects[eff];
        const pureIdx = ingredient.purity[i];
        let val = pureIdx==1 ? 0 : lvl;
        const displayName = (val < 0 && negateMap[eff]) ? negateMap[eff] : eff;
        const absVal = Math.abs(val);
        parts.push(`${displayName} ${absVal}`);
    }

    return parts.join(" | ");
}

if (!("Alchemy" in setup)) setup.Alchemy = {};

setup.Alchemy.ingredient = function(add, ingredients, quantity = 1)
{
    if (!V.pc.ingredients) V.pc.ingredients = [];

    const name   = ingredients.name;
    const purity = ingredients.purity ?? Object.keys(setup.ingredient[ingredients.name].effects).map(() => 0);

    const idx = V.pc.ingredients.findIndex(item =>
        item.name == name && setup.arrEquals(item.purity, purity)
    );

    if (add) 
    {
        if (idx >= 0) 
        {
            V.pc.ingredients[idx].quantity += quantity;
        } 
        else 
        {
            V.pc.ingredients.push({
                name,
                quantity,
                purity: [...purity]
            });
        }
    }
    else 
    {
        if (idx >= 0) 
        {
            const current = V.pc.ingredients[idx];
            if (quantity >= current.quantity) 
            {
                V.pc.ingredients.splice(idx, 1);
            } 
            else 
            {
                current.quantity -= quantity;
            }
        }
    }
}

setup.Alchemy.value = function(value, pure)
{
    let result = [];
    let resultobj = {};
    for (const ingredient of V.pc.ingredients)
    {
        if (pure)
        {
            const total = ingredient.purity.length;
            const purity = ingredient.purity.reduce((i, ing) => i + ing, 0);
            const purityname = purity == total ? "pristine" : purity >= total - 1 ? "pure" : purity >= total - 2 ? "lightly pure" : purity >= total - 3 ? "clean" : purity >= total - 4 ? "lightly clean" : false;
            if (purityname && purity > 0)
            {
                if (value) result.push(ingredient.quantity);
                else
                {
                    let finalname = purityname + " " + ingredient.name;
                    resultobj[finalname] = {
                        name: ingredient.name,
                        purity: ingredient.purity
                    };
                }
            }
        }
        else
        {
            const purity = ingredient.purity.reduce((i, ing) => i + ing, 0);
            if (purity == 0)
            {
                if (value) result.push(ingredient.quantity);
                else
                {
                    resultobj[ingredient.name] = {
                        name: ingredient.name,
                        purity: ingredient.purity
                    };
                }
            }
        }
    }
    if (!value) result.push({ingredients: resultobj});
    return result;
}

setup.Alchemy.boost = function(ingredient)
{
    const moonphase = "waxing gibbous"
    const ing = setup.ingredient[ingredient];

    if (ing["boost phase"] != moonphase) 
    {
        return { ...ing.effects };
    }

    const boosted = { ...ing.effects };

    const boostPower = ing["boost power"];
    const boostEffects = ing["boost effects"];

    for (const eff of boostEffects) 
    {
        boosted[eff] *= boostPower;
    }

    return boosted;
}

setup.Alchemy.purify = function(ingredient, effect, tool, quantity)
{  
    console.log("purify :", quantity);
    if (typeof quantity == "string") quantity = Number(quantity);
    const effDef = setup.ingredient[ingredient.name].effects;
    const effectNames = Object.keys(effDef);
    const idx = effectNames.indexOf(effect);
    if (ingredient.purity[idx] != 0) return null;
    setup.Alchemy.ingredient(false, ingredient, quantity);
    const time = setup.tools[tool].speed;
    const timeready = setup.Time.add_minutes(time);
    const newPurity = ingredient.purity.slice();
    newPurity[idx] = 1;
    const purifiedObj = {
        name: ingredient.name,
        purity: newPurity,
        quantity: quantity,
        tool: tool,
        time: timeready,
    };

    if (!V.purify) V.purify = [];
    V.purify.push(purifiedObj);
}

setup.Alchemy.purify_ready = function()
{
    const ready = [];

    const isready = (times) => (times[0] <= V.minute && times[1] <= V.hour && times[2] <= V.day && times[3] <= V.month && times[4] <= V.year && times[5] <= V.gameday);

    V.purify.forEach((item, idx) => {
        if (isready(item.time)) 
        {
            ready.push({ index: idx, item: item });
        }
    });
    return ready;
}

setup.Alchemy.purify_recover = function()
{
    const ready = setup.Alchemy.purify_ready();

    ready.sort((a, b) => b.index - a.index).forEach(({ index, item }) => {
            setup.Alchemy.ingredient(true, item, item.quantity);
            V.purify.splice(index, 1);
        });
}

setup.Alchemy.preparation = function(add, ingredient, quantity = 1)
{
    if (!V.Brew) V.Brew = [];
    if (add) 
    {
        setup.Alchemy.ingredient(false, ingredient, quantity);
        const existing = V.Brew.find(i => i.name == ingredient.name && setup.arrEquals(i.purity, ingredient.purity));
        if (existing) 
        {
            existing.quantity += quantity;
        } 
        else 
        {
            if (!ingredient.quantity) ingredient.quantity = 1;
            V.Brew.push(ingredient);
        }
    } 
    else 
    {
        const idx = V.Brew.findIndex(i => i.name == ingredient.name && setup.arrEquals(i.purity, ingredient.purity));
        if (idx == -1) return;
        if (V.Brew[idx].quantity > 1) V.Brew[idx].quantity -= quantity;
        else V.Brew.splice(idx, 1)[0];
        setup.Alchemy.ingredient(true, ingredient, quantity);
    }
}

setup.Alchemy.brew = function(name)
{
    const totalEffects = {};
    const ethanol = V.Ethanol[0];
    const resonant = ethanol.resonant ?? 1;
    V.Brew.forEach(ing => {
        const ingDef = setup.ingredient[ing.name];

        const effectKeys = Object.keys(ingDef.effects);
        const boosted    = setup.Alchemy.boost(ing.name) ?? {};

        effectKeys.forEach((eff, idx) => {
            if (ing.purity[idx] != 0) return;
            const base   = boosted[eff] ?? ingDef.effects[eff];
            const val    = base * (ing.quantity || 1);
            const finalVal = val * ethanol.purity;
            totalEffects[eff] = (totalEffects[eff] || 0) + finalVal;
        });
    });

    if (!V.pc.potion) V.pc.potion = [];
    const potionName = name;
    
    const existing = V.pc.potion.find(p => 
        p.name == potionName && setup.arrEquals(Object.keys(p.effects), Object.keys(totalEffects)) && setup.arrEquals(Object.values(p.effects), Object.values(totalEffects))
    );

    if (existing) 
    {
        existing.quantity = (existing.quantity || 0) + 1;
    } 
    else 
    {
        V.pc.potion.push({ name: potionName, effects: totalEffects, quantity: 1 });
    }
    V.Brew = [];
    V.Ethanol = [];
}

setup.Alchemy.ethanol = function(value)
{
    let result = [];
    for (const idx in V.pc.Ethanol)
    {
        if (value) result.push(V.pc.Ethanol[idx].quantity);
        else result.push({name: V.pc.Ethanol[idx].name, purity: V.pc.Ethanol[idx].purity, resonant: V.pc.Ethanol[idx].resonant});
    }
    return result;
}

setup.Alchemy.add_ethanol = function(add, ethanol, quantity = 1)
{
    if (!V.pc.Ethanol) V.pc.Ethanol = [];
    const purity = setup.ethanol[ethanol].purity;
    const resonant = setup.ethanol[ethanol].resonant || false;
    const idx = V.pc.Ethanol.findIndex(item =>
        item.name == ethanol && item.resonant == resonant
    );

    if (add) 
    {
        if (idx >= 0) 
        {
            V.pc.Ethanol[idx].quantity += quantity;
        } 
        else 
        {
            V.pc.Ethanol.push({
                name: ethanol,
                quantity,
                purity: purity,
                resonant: resonant,
            });
        }
    }
    else 
    {
        if (idx >= 0) 
        {
            const current = V.pc.Ethanol[idx];
            if (quantity >= current.quantity) 
            {
                V.pc.Ethanol.splice(idx, 1);
            } 
            else 
            {
                current.quantity -= quantity;
            }
        }
    }
}

setup.School.is_class_hour = function(course)
{
    const cinfo = setup.School.courses[course] || setup.School.sports[course];
    let block = setup.School.blocks[cinfo.schedule];
    let weekday = setup.Time.weekday();
    for (let i = 0; i < block.length; i++)
        if (block[i].day == weekday && setup.School.classes_today())
            return [block[i].hour, block[i].length];
    return false;
}

setup.Houses.can_join = function(house, npc = "PC")
{
    // whether this house can be joined based on gender traditions (if there are any)
    let gender = V.pc.equals(npc) ? setup.pcgender() : setup.people.get_gender(npc);
    if (V.lefthouse && V.lefthouse.includes(house))
        return false;
    else if (!V.tradgreeks)
        return true;
    else if (this.is_fraternity(house))
        return ["male", "transgender male", "nonbinary afab", "nonbinary amab"].includes(gender);
    else if (this.is_sorority(house))
        return ["female", "transgender female", "nonbinary afab", "nonbinary amab"].includes(gender);
    else
        return true;
}
~
setup.Houses.can_join = function(house, npc = "PC")
{
    // whether this house can be joined based on gender traditions (if there are any)
    let gender = V.pc.equals(npc) ? setup.pcgender() : setup.people.get_gender(npc);
    let masculinity = (V.pc.equals(npc) && V.optcrossdressing) ? setup.masculinity_calculation(V.pc) : 0;
    if (V.lefthouse && V.lefthouse.includes(house))
        return false;
    else if (!V.tradgreeks)
        return true;
    else if (this.is_fraternity(house))
    {
        let retval = (V.pc.equals(npc) && V.optcrossdressing) ? masculinity > -1 : ["male", "transgender male", "nonbinary afab", "nonbinary amab", "hermaphrodite (male appearance)", "hermaphrodite (female appearance)"].includes(gender);
        return retval;
    }
    else if (this.is_sorority(house))
    {
        let retval = (V.pc.equals(npc) && V.optcrossdressing) ? masculinity < 1 : ["female", "transgender female", "nonbinary afab", "nonbinary amab", "hermaphrodite (male appearance)", "hermaphrodite (female appearance)"].includes(gender);
        return retval;
    }
    else
        return true;
}

setup.Houses.sort_penises = function(house)
{
    let members = setup.shuffle(this.people_of_houses(house));
    let pres = this.get_president(house);
    let rush = this.get_rushchair(house);
    
    let i = members.indexOf(rush);
    members.deleteAt(i);
    i = members.indexOf(pres);
    members.deleteAt(i);
    
    let ratio = 0;
    for (const member of members)
    {
        if (setup.people.has_part(member, "penis"))
        {
            ratio += 1;
        }
        else
        {
            ratio += -1;
        }
    }

    return (members.length / ratio) > 1 ? 1 : (members.length / ratio) < -1 ? -1 : members.length / ratio;
}
