setup.Time.adjust_needs = function(minutes)
~
setup.Time.heat = function(minutes)
{
    if (V.opttemperatureeffects && V.optweathereffects && V.opttemperatureoverhaul)
    {
        const t1 = performance.now();
        if (!V.pc.temperature) V.pc.temperature = 37;
        if (!V.pcneeds.Heat) V.pcneeds.Heat = 0;
        const inside = V.location ? !Story.get(V.location).tags.includes("outdoors") : true;
        
        const basalMetabolicRate = 1.2;
        const transThermalCoeff = 0.05;
        const thermalCapacity = 3500;
        const bodyMass = (40 + (V.pc.plumpness / 1000) * 80) + ((V.pc.muscle / 1000) * 30);
        const bodyHeight = 1.2 + (V.pc.height / 1000) * 0.65;
        const activityRate = 0.3;
        
        const min = 36.9;
        const max = 37.1;
        
        const surfaceArea = Math.pow(bodyMass, 0.425) * Math.pow((bodyHeight * 100), 0.725) * 0.007184;
        const surfaceAccess = surfaceArea - (setup.heat_cover() * surfaceArea);
        let wetCover = 0;
        for (const item in V.pc.sort_clothing_by_layer(V.pc.clothes))
        {
            const titem = V.pc.sort_clothing_by_layer(V.pc.clothes)[item]?.properties;
            if (titem && titem["wetness"]) wetCover += 1;
        }
        
        const metabolic = basalMetabolicRate + activityRate * bodyMass;
        const sexBoost = V.pcneeds.Arousal / 5;
        const satBoost = V.pcneeds.Food / 10;
        const heatBonus = V.heatbonus || 1;
        
        const stefanLaw = 5.670374419e-8;
        const skinEmission = 0.95;
        const relativeHumidity = 0.5;
            
        const times = minutes > 240 ? minutes / 8 : minutes > 120 ? minutes / 4 : minutes > 60 ? minutes / 2 : 1;
        const loops = minutes > 240 ? 8 : minutes > 120 ? 4 : minutes > 60 ? 2 : 1;
        for (let i = 0; i < times; i++)
        {
            const wind = inside ? 1 : setup.wind_speed(minutes) * 10;
            const body = V.pc.temperature;
            const felt = V.pc.temperature_felt();
            const wet = wetCover > 0 ? wetCover + 1 : 1;
            
            const hyperFactor = 1 - (Math.abs(V.pcneeds.Heat) / 2000);
            const heatConvector = (4.6 + 3.1 * wind) * wet;
            const radiationLoss = stefanLaw * surfaceAccess * (Math.pow(body + 273.15, 4) - Math.pow(felt + 273.15, 4));
            const convectionLoss = transThermalCoeff * heatConvector * surfaceAccess * (body - felt);
            const heatLoss = convectionLoss + radiationLoss;
            
            let heatProd = (metabolic + sexBoost + satBoost + heatBonus) * hyperFactor;
            const heatCapacity = thermalCapacity * bodyMass;
            
            let deltaT = (heatProd - heatLoss) * (60 * loops) / heatCapacity;
            let sweatRate = 0;
            if (body > max) 
            {
                const heatEvaporation = 2.2 + 0.5 * wind;
                const bodyVaporPressure = 610.94 * Math.exp((17.625 * body) / (body + 243.04));
                const feltVaporPressure  = (610.94 * Math.exp((17.625 * felt) / (felt + 243.04)));
                const evaporationNeeded = deltaT;

                sweatRate = Math.abs((evaporationNeeded / skinEmission) * 60);
                const evaporationMax = 1.5;
                if (sweatRate > evaporationMax) sweatRate = evaporationMax;
                const deltaV = (body - sweatRate * stefanLaw * (heatEvaporation * (bodyVaporPressure / feltVaporPressure))) * 600 / (bodyMass * 4186);
                
                const sweatPart = ["shoulder", "crotch", "back"];
                for (const part of sweatPart)
                {
                    V.pc.add_wetness_part(part, false, sweatRate * 100);
                    console.log("part :", part);
                }
                deltaT -= deltaV;
                console.log("heatEvaporation :", heatEvaporation);
                console.log("deltaV :", deltaV);
                console.log("sweatRate :", sweatRate);
            }

            V.pc.temperature += deltaT;
            console.log("bodyMass :", bodyMass);
            console.log("body :", body);
            console.log("felt :", felt);
            console.log("wet :", wet);
            console.log("hyperFactor :", hyperFactor);
            console.log("surfaceArea :", surfaceArea);
            console.log("surfaceAccess :", surfaceAccess);
            console.log("convectionLoss :", convectionLoss);
            console.log("radiationLoss :", radiationLoss);
            console.log("heatLoss :", heatLoss);
            console.log("satBoost :", satBoost);
            console.log("sexBoost :", sexBoost);
            console.log("heatBonus :", heatBonus);
            console.log("metabolic :", metabolic);
            console.log("heatProd :", heatProd);
            console.log("heatCapacity :", heatCapacity);
            console.log("sweatRate", sweatRate);
            console.log("deltaT :", deltaT);
            console.log("wind :", wind);
    
            if (V.pc.temperature < 32) V.pc.temperature = 32;
            if (V.pc.temperature > 42) V.pc.temperature = 42;
    
            if (felt >= min && felt <= max) 
            {
                V.pcneeds.Heat = 0;
            } 
            else 
            {
                if (V.pc.temperature <= 32) 
                {
                    V.pcneeds.Heat = -1000;
                } 
                else if (V.pc.temperature >= 42) 
                {
                    V.pcneeds.Heat = 1000;
                } 
                else 
                {
                    V.pcneeds.Heat = (V.pc.temperature - 32) * 200 - 1000;
                }
            }
        }
        const t2 = performance.now();
        console.log(t2 - t1, " ms");
    }
}

setup.random_name = function(gender, rng = new RNG())
{
	if (V.optlegacynames)
	{
		let firstname = rng.randomchoice(setup.Names[gender + "legacy"]);
		let surname = rng.randomchoice(setup.Names["surnameslegacy"]);
		return firstname + " " + surname;
	}
	else
	{
		const namecomponents = setup.species.human.genders[gender].namecomponents;
		const unusualnametypes = setup.Names.unusual_name_keys;
		const useunusualnames = !("optunusualnames" in V) || V.optunusualnames;

		let namelist = [];
		for (let complist of namecomponents)
		{
			let k = rng.randomrelfreq(complist);
			while (!useunusualnames && unusualnametypes.includes(k))
				k = complist[0]; 				// this is pretty much the least efficient way to do this but also less annoying for me personally
												// unusual names are generally quite low-frequency anyway so this shouldn't loop much
			let name = rng.randomchoice(setup.Names[k]);
			namelist.push(name);
		}
		return namelist.join(' ');
	}
}
~
setup.random_name = function(gender, rng = new RNG(), ethnicity, traitassocid, ethnicitybis)
{
    if (V.optlegacynames || !(ethnicity))
    {
        let firstname = rng.randomchoice(setup.Names[gender + "legacy"]);
        let surname = rng.randomchoice(setup.Names["surnameslegacy"]);
        return firstname + " " + surname;
    }
    else
    {
        let namecomponents = setup.species.human.genders[gender].namecomponents;
        const unusualnametypes = setup.Names.unusual_name_keys;
        const useunusualnames = !("optunusualnames" in V) || V.optunusualnames;
        
        let namelist = [];
        for (let complist of namecomponents)
        {
            let k = rng.randomrelfreq(complist);
            while (!useunusualnames && unusualnametypes.includes(k))
                k = complist[0];

            let name = rng.randomchoice(setup.trait_associations[traitassocid][ethnicity][k]);
            namelist.push(name);
        }
        return namelist.join(' ');
    }
}
~~
setup.people.add_random = function(gender, archetype, type, rng = new RNG())
{
    let bibonus = V.bibonus;
    let gaybonus = V.gaybonus;
    if (bibonus > 0) bibonus *= 2;
    if (gaybonus > 0) gaybonus *= 2;

    let db = setup.people_db();
    let name = setup.unique_random_name(gender, rng);

    let attractionpos = setup.get_gender_node(gender, "attraction");

    if (V.optstraightfrequency && V.optqueerfrequency && V.optbifrequency)
    {
        for (let i = 0; i < attractionpos.length; i+=2)
        {
            if (attractionpos[i].label == "bi") attractionpos[i+1] = V.optbifrequency;
            else if (attractionpos[i].label != "straight") attractionpos[i+1] = V.optqueerfrequency;
            else attractionpos[i+1] = V.optstraightfrequency;

            if (typeof attractionpos[i+1] == "string")
                attractionpos[i+1] = parseInt(attractionpos[i+1]);
        }
    }
    else
    {
        for (let i = 0; i < attractionpos.length; i+=2)
        {
            if (attractionpos[i].label == "bi") attractionpos[i+1] += bibonus;
            else if (attractionpos[i].label != "straight") attractionpos[i+1] += gaybonus;
        }
    }

    let attraction = rng.randomrelfreq(attractionpos);

    let newperson = {"special": false, "archetype": archetype, "type": type, "species": ["human", gender], "attraction": attraction.label};
    db[name] = newperson;
    return name;
}
~
setup.people.add_random = function(gender, archetype, type, rng = new RNG())
{
    let bibonus = V.bibonus;
    let gaybonus = V.gaybonus;
    if (bibonus > 0) bibonus *= 2;
    if (gaybonus > 0) gaybonus *= 2;

    let db = setup.people_db();
    let traitassocid = rng.randomrelfreq(setup.trait_association_rate);
    console.log("traitassocid :", traitassocid);
    let ethnicity = rng.randomchoice(Object.keys(setup.trait_associations[traitassocid]));
    console.log("ethnicity :", ethnicity);
    let genetic = [];
    let name = setup.unique_random_name(gender, rng, ethnicity, traitassocid);

    let attractionpos = setup.get_gender_node(gender, "attraction");

    if (V.optstraightfrequency && V.optqueerfrequency && V.optbifrequency)
    {
        for (let i = 0; i < attractionpos.length; i+=2)
        {
            if (attractionpos[i].label == "bi") attractionpos[i+1] = V.optbifrequency;
            else if (attractionpos[i].label != "straight") attractionpos[i+1] = V.optqueerfrequency;
            else attractionpos[i+1] = V.optstraightfrequency;

            if (typeof attractionpos[i+1] == "string")
                attractionpos[i+1] = parseInt(attractionpos[i+1]);
        }
    }
    else
    {
        for (let i = 0; i < attractionpos.length; i+=2)
        {
            if (attractionpos[i].label == "bi") attractionpos[i+1] += bibonus;
            else if (attractionpos[i].label != "straight") attractionpos[i+1] += gaybonus;
        }
    }

    let attraction = rng.randomrelfreq(attractionpos);

    let newperson = {"special": false, "archetype": archetype, "ethnicity": ethnicity, "genetic": genetic, "type": type, "species": ["human", gender], "attraction": attraction.label};
    db[name] = newperson;
    return name;
}
~~
setup.unique_random_name = function(gender, rng = new RNG())
{
	let name = "";
    let tries = 0;
    while (setup.name_in_use(name))
    {
        tries++;
        if (name != "")
        {
            /*
            console.log(tries + ": " + rng.state);
            console.log("rejecting name " + name);
            if (name in db)
                console.log("name already in database");
            else if (name.split(' ')[0] == V.pcname.split(' ')[0])
                console.log("name matches PC's first name");
            else if (name.split(' ')[1] == V.pcname.split(' ')[1])
                console.log("name matches PC's last name");
            */
        }
        name = setup.random_name(gender, rng);
        if (tries == 100)
        {
            rng = new RNG(rng.seed + 1);
            tries = 0;
        }
    }
	return name;
}
~
setup.unique_random_name = function(gender, rng = new RNG(), ethnicity, traitassocid)
{
	let name = "";
    let tries = 0;
    while (setup.name_in_use(name))
    {
        tries++;
        if (name != "")
        {
            /*
            console.log(tries + ": " + rng.state);
            console.log("rejecting name " + name);
            if (name in db)
                console.log("name already in database");
            else if (name.split(' ')[0] == V.pcname.split(' ')[0])
                console.log("name matches PC's first name");
            else if (name.split(' ')[1] == V.pcname.split(' ')[1])
                console.log("name matches PC's last name");
            */
        }
        name = setup.random_name(gender, rng, ethnicity, traitassocid);
        if (tries == 100)
        {
            rng = new RNG(rng.seed + 1);
            tries = 0;
        }
    }
	return name;
}

                        else if (stat == "height" && V.heightbonus && !(stat in pdata))

                            val += (100 * V.heightbonus);

                            {
                                if (this.gender == "female")
                                {
                                    val += -150;
                                }
                                else
                                {
                                    val += 150;
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        {
                            val += (100);
                        }
                        else if (stat == "vaginalmi size" && !(stat in pdata))
                        {
                            val += (100);
                        }
                        else if (stat == "scrotum size" && !(stat in pdata))
                        {
                            val += (100);
                        }
                        else if (stat == "hips size" && !(stat in pdata))
                        {
                            if (this.gender == "female")
                            {
                                val += 150;
                            }
                            else
                            {
                                val += -150;
                            }
                        }
                        else if (stat == "waist size" && !(stat in pdata))
                        {
                            const targetR = (this.gender == "female") ? 0.8 : 0.9;
                            const acceptMin = (this.gender == "female") ? 0.7 : 0.8;
                            const acceptMax = (this.gender == "female") ? 0.85 : 0.95;

                            const currentR = val / this["hips size"];

                            if (currentR < acceptMin || currentR > acceptMax) 
                            {
                                let targetWaist = this["hips size"] * targetR;
                                val = val * 0.5 + targetWaist * 0.5;
                            }

                            const maxWaist = this["hips size"] * acceptMax;
                            const minWaist = this["hips size"] * 0.5;
                            val = Math.round(Math.max(minWaist, Math.min(maxWaist, val)));
                        }
                        else if (stat == "belly fat" && !(stat in pdata))
                        {
                            if (pdata["muscle"] > 400) val += -100;
                            else if (pdata["muscle"] > 500) val += -175;
                            else if (pdata["muscle"] > 600) val += -250;
                            else if (pdata["muscle"] > 800) val += -300;
                            
                            if (pdata["plumpness"] > 200) val += 100;
                            else if (pdata["plumpness"] > 400) val += 200;
                            else if (pdata["plumpness"] > 600) val += 300;
                            else if (pdata["plumpness"] > 800) val += 400;
                            
                            if (stat < 0) val = 0;
                            else if (stat > 1000) val = 1000;
                        }

~~
    possible_distinguishing_marks(ignorecoding = false, ignorerestrict = false)
~
    possible_private_marks(ignorecoding = false, part)
    {
        let parts = 0;
        if (part)
        {
            parts = Array.isArray(part) ? part : (typeof part === "string" ? [part] : []);
        }
        else
        {
            parts = ["clitoris", "mound", "penis", "glans", "testicles", "pubic asperity", "labia asperity"];
        }

        const slotsused = [];
        if (this.private_marks)
        {
            for (const mark of this.private_marks)
            {
                const markInfo = setup.private_marks[mark];
                if (parts.includes(markInfo.slot))
                {
                    slotsused.push(markInfo.slot);
                }
            }
        }

        const retval = [];
        let coding = this.is_femme() ? "femme" : (this.is_masc() ? "masc" : "enby");

        for (const [mark, markinfo] of Object.entries(setup.private_marks))
        {
            if (!Array.isArray(parts) && parts !== markinfo.slot)
            {
                continue;
            }
            if (Array.isArray(parts) && !parts.includes(markinfo.slot))
            {
                continue;
            }

            if ((!ignorecoding && markinfo.coding && !this.is_pc && !markinfo.coding.includes(coding)) || slotsused.includes(markinfo.slot))
            {
                continue;
            }
            retval.push(mark);
        }
        return retval;
    }

    possible_hymen_form()
    {
        return Object.keys(setup.hymen_form);
    }

    possible_distinguishing_marks(ignorecoding = false, ignorerestrict = false)

    penis_descriptor()
    {
        let hair = V.optextrabodyhair ? " " + setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[this.pubic_style].shortdescriptor + " " : "";
~
    vaginalma_descriptor()
    {
        let hair = (setup.pc().has_inclination("Trichophilia") && V.optextrabodyhair) ? " " + setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[this.pubic_style].shortdescriptor + " " : "";

        let desc = "";
        if (this["vaginalma"] == 0) return "flat";
        return ["flat", "almost flat", "little", "small", "noticeable", "very noticeable", "slightly puffy", "puffy", "subtly full", "full", "plump", "very puffy", "swollen", "pumped"][Math.floor(this["vaginalma size"] / 75)] || "very noticeable";

        return desc + hair;
    }

    vaginalmi_descriptor(includecolor = false)
    {
        let size = ["non visible", "barely visible", "extremely short", "very short", "short", "small", "petite", "average", "moderate", "notable", "long", "substantial", "very long", "meaty", "curtain"][Math.floor(this["vaginalmi size"] / 70)] || "small";
        let color = this["vaginalmi color"] || "beige";
        return includecolor ? size + " " + color : size;
    }

    scrotum_descriptor()
    {
        let hair = (setup.pc().has_inclination("Trichophilia") && V.optextrabodyhair) ? " " + setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[this.pubic_style].shortdescriptor + " " : "";

        let desc = "";
        if (this["scrotum"] == 0) return "almost inexistant";
        return ["almost inexistant", "small", "little", "average", "dangling", "very dangling", "massively dangling"][Math.floor(this["scrotum size"] / 150)] || "average";

        return desc + hair;
    }

    lubricated_descriptor()
    {
        let wet = ["dry", "almost dry", "little wet", "somewhat wet", "wet", "very wet", "almost dripping", "dripping", "drooling"][Math.floor(this.fleeting_stats["lubricated"] / 100)] || "dry";
        return wet;
    }

    tearness_descriptor()
    {
        let tear = ["no pain", "very little discomfort", "little discomfort", "moderate discomfort", "little sting", "sting", "sharp sting", "very sharp sting", "unbearable sting"][Math.floor(this.fleeting_stats["tearness"] / 100)] || "no pain";
        return tear;
    }

    vaginatightness_descriptor()
    {
        let vaginatight = ["extremely tight", "very tight", "tight", "somewhat tight", "somewhat loose", "loose", "very loose", "extremily loose", "gaping"][Math.floor(this.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] / 100)] || "extremely tight";
        return vaginatight;
    }

    anustightness_descriptor()
    {
        let anustight = ["extremely tight", "very tight", "tight", "somewhat tight", "somewhat loose", "loose", "very loose", "extremily loose", "gaping"][Math.floor(this.fleeting_stats["anustightness"] / 100)] || "extremely tight";
        return anustight;
    }

    hips_descriptor()
    {
        let hips = "";
        const ratio = this["waist size"] / this["hips size"];

        if (ratio < 0.61) hips = "saddlebag";
        else if (ratio < 0.71) hips = "hourglass";
        else if (ratio < 0.76) hips = "wide";
        else if (ratio < 0.81) hips = "average";
        else if (ratio < 0.96) hips = "narrow";
        else hips = "very narrow";
        
        return hips;
    }
    
    skin_descriptor(hormonal = 0)
    {
        let tan = Math.floor(this["tan color"] / 100) + hormonal;
        if (tan >= 10) tan = 9;
        let yellow = Math.floor(this["yellow color"] / 100);
        if (yellow >= 10) yellow = 9;
        const skintones = [
        ["pale ivory", "very light beige", "light beige", "warm ivory", "soft peach", "creamy beige", "pale gold", "light honey", "golden beige", "warm gold"],
        ["fair porcelain", "very light cream", "light cream", "warm pale", "soft almond", "peach cream", "pale gold", "light honey", "golden cream", "warm honey"],
        ["fair skin", "light sand", "light honey", "warm beige", "soft caramel", "honey cream", "light bronze", "golden sand", "warm bronze", "rich honey"],
        ["light tan", "sand", "beige tan", "warm sand", "light caramel", "golden tan", "bronze tan", "honeyed tan", "rich tan", "golden bronze"],
        ["medium tan", "warm sand", "golden beige", "caramel tan", "olive", "warm olive", "bronze gold", "rich golden", "deep bronze", "dark olive"],
        ["tan", "light brown", "warm brown", "deep caramel", "golden olive", "rich olive", "dark bronze", "deep gold", "mahogany", "deep honey"],
        ["dark tan", "brown", "warm chocolate", "rich caramel", "olive bronze", "deep olive", "bronze mahogany", "dark gold", "rich mahogany", "deep brown"],
        ["deep brown", "dark chocolate", "warm espresso", "rich bronze", "dark olive", "bronze mahogany", "ebony", "dark chestnut", "deep mahogany", "rich ebony"],
        ["very dark brown", "dark cocoa", "warm Umber", "deep mahogany", "dark bronze", "ebony olive", "dark ebony", "rich chestnut", "deep Umber", "black"],
        ["darkest brown", "intense cocoa", "darkest Umber", "deepest mahogany", "darkest olive", "ebony", "rich ebony", "darkest chestnut", "deepest Umber", "pure ebony"]
        ];
        return skintones[tan][yellow];
    }
    
    hormonal_descriptor()
    {
        let arousal = this.arousal() > 800 ? "deep-red and " : this.arousal() > 600 ? "red and " : this.arousal() > 300 ? "deep-rose and " : this.arousal() > 100 ? "rosy and " : "";
        return arousal + this.skin_descriptor(Math.floor(this["hormonal"] / 100));
    }

setup.assemble_parts = function(configured_parts)
{
    let parts = ["chest", "stomach", "back", "wrist", "wrist", "forearm", "forearm", "upper arm", "upper arm", "hand", "hand", "neck", "head", "face", "mouth",
        "shoulder", "shoulder", "waist", "hip", "hip", "thigh", "thigh", "crotch", "calf", "calf", "ankle", "ankle", "foot", "foot", "butt", "anus", "nipples"];

    if (configured_parts.includes("breasts"))
    {
        parts.push("breasts");
    }
    if (configured_parts.includes("vagina"))
    {
        parts.push("vagina");
        parts.push("clitoris");
    }
    if (configured_parts.includes("penis"))
    {
        parts.push("penis");
        parts.push("balls");
    }

    return parts;
}
~
setup.assemble_parts = function(configured_parts)
{
    let parts = ["chest", "stomach", "back", "wrist", "wrist", "forearm", "forearm", "upper arm", "upper arm", "hand", "hand", "neck", "head", "face", "mouth",
        "shoulder", "shoulder", "waist", "hip", "hip", "thigh", "thigh", "crotch", "calf", "calf", "ankle", "ankle", "foot", "foot", "butt", "anus", "nipples"];

    if (configured_parts.includes("breasts"))
    {
        parts.push("breasts");
    }
    if (configured_parts.includes("vagina"))
    {
        parts.push("vagina");
        parts.push("outer lips");
        parts.push("urinary meatus");
        parts.push("clitoris");
    }
    if (configured_parts.includes("penis"))
    {
        parts.push("penis");
        parts.push("glans");
        parts.push("frenelum");
        parts.push("balls");
    }

    return parts;
}

                    function updateAllFields() 
                    {
                        $("#hormonalval").text(V.npctocustomize.hormonal_descriptor());
                        $("#monsval").text(V.npctocustomize.mons_descriptor());
                        $("#pubicaval").text((setup.checkAO("pubic asperity", "slot", V.npctocustomize, "private_marks", "private_marks").value) || "nothing in particular");

                        $("#glansval").text((setup.checkAO("glans", "slot", V.npctocustomize, "private_marks", "private_marks").value) || "glans");
                        $("#testval").text((setup.checkAO("testicles", "slot", V.npctocustomize, "private_marks", "private_marks").value) || "");
                        $("#clitval").text((setup.checkAO("clitoris", "slot", V.npctocustomize, "private_marks", "private_marks").value) || "clitoris");
                        $("#moundval").text((setup.checkAO("mound", "slot", V.npctocustomize, "private_marks", "private_marks").value) || "outer lips");
                    }
                    V.npctocustomize.private_marks = V.npctocustomize.private_marks || [];
                    V.npctocustomize.private_marks = setup.checkArrayChange(V.npctocustomize.private_marks, updateAllFields);
                    $(document).off("input.pc-update", "#slidehormonal");
                    $(document).off("input.pc-update", "#slidemons");
                    $(document).on("input.npc-update", "#slidehormonal", updateAllFields);

    {
        let pc = V.pc;
        let pstyle = pc.pubic_style;
        let styleinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[pstyle];

        // calculate growth_day based on current amount of hair and the PC's natural hairiness
        let growth_day = (9 + styleinfo.shavelevel * setup.Cosmetics.body_hair_growth[pc.body_hair_growth].growth_rate);
        // apply the multiplier cheat
        if (growth_multiplier == 0){ // we don't wanna grow hair ever
            growth_day = V.gameday + 1 // every day, procratinate hair growth until tomorrow (so it never grows)
        } else {
            growth_day = growth_day / growth_multiplier;
        }
        if (V.gameday - V.lastpubicstyle >= growth_day)
        {
            if (styleinfo.shavelevel < 4)
            {
                let nextstyle = pstyle;
                let pstyleinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[pstyle];
                for (const style of Object.keys(setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles)){
                    let styleinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[style];
                    if (styleinfo.unstyled && styleinfo.shavelevel == (pstyleinfo.shavelevel + 1)){
                        nextstyle = style;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                pc.pubic_style = nextstyle;
                State.setVar("$lastpubicstyle", V.gameday);
                styleinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[nextstyle];
                setup.add_notification("Your pubic hair is now " + styleinfo.descriptor + ".");
            }
        }
    }
~
    {
        let pc = V.pc;
        let pstyle = pc.pubic_style;
        let plength = pc.pubic_length;
        let styleinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_styles[pstyle];
        let lengthinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_length[plength];
        let shavel = lengthinfo.shavelevel == -1 ? 4 : lengthinfo.shavelevel;

        let growth_day = (5 + lengthinfo.shavelevel * setup.Cosmetics.body_hair_growth[pc.body_hair_growth].growth_rate);
        if (growth_multiplier == 0){
            growth_day = V.gameday + 1
        } else {
            growth_day = growth_day / growth_multiplier;
        }
        console.log("growth_day", growth_day);
        if (V.gameday - V.lastpubicstyle >= growth_day)
        {
            if (lengthinfo.shavelevel < 4)
            {
                let nextlength = plength;
                let nextstyle = pstyle;
                let plengthinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_length[plength];
                for (const length of Object.keys(setup.Cosmetics.pubic_length))
                {
                    let linfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_length[length];
                    if (linfo.shavelevel == (plengthinfo.shavelevel + 1))
                    {
                        if (styleinfo.shavelevel <= linfo.shavelevel) nextstyle = "wild";
                        nextlength = length;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                pc.pubic_length = nextlength;
                pc.pubic_style = nextstyle;
                State.setVar("$lastpubicstyle", V.gameday);
                lengthinfo = setup.Cosmetics.pubic_length[nextlength];
                setup.add_notification("Your pubic hair is now " + lengthinfo.descriptor + ".");
            }
        }
    }

    list_clothing(viewer = this, short = false)
    {
        const clothing = this.visible_clothing(viewer);
        return setup.english_clothing(clothing, short);
    }
~
    get_masculinity()
    {
        let result = 0;
        let PC = V.pc;
        this.masculinity_value.clothing = {};
        let masc = this.masculinity_value.clothing;
        this.visible_clothing(PC).forEach(clothes => {
            const obsItem = this.is_clothing_obscured(clothes);
            if (!obsItem)
            {
                const i = this.get_clothing_index(clothes);
                const cItem = new ClothingItem(this.clothes[i]);
                if (cItem.masculinity !== null)
                {
                    masc[cItem.item] = cItem.masculinity;
                    result += cItem.masculinity;
                }
                if (this.is_wet(i, true))
                {
                    masc[cItem.item] = cItem.masculinity - 1;
                    result += -1;
                }
            }
        });
        console.log("masculinity based on clothes", result);
        return result;
    }

    list_clothing(viewer = this, short = false)
    {
        const clothing = this.visible_clothing(viewer);
        return setup.english_clothing(clothing, short);
    }

~~
StainSystem
~~
                let stainname = "";
                if (stains.length > 1)
                    stainname = "thoroughly stained";
                else if (stains[0] == "pee")
                    stainname = "urine-stained";
                else

    add_stain(i, stain)
    {
        i = this.get_clothing_index(i);
        if (setup.clothes_stainless.includes(this.clothing_archetype(i).category) || this.clothing_has_flag(i, "waterproof")) return;

        let cItem = new ClothingItem(this.clothes[i]);
        let stains = cItem.get_property("stains") || [];
        if (!stains.includes(stain))
            stains.push(stain);
        cItem.set_property("stains",stains);
        this.clothes[i] = cItem.get_data_structure();
    }
~
    add_stain(i, stain, quantity = 1000)
    {
        console.log("I'm called by stain :", stain, "on that clothes :", i, "with that quantity :", quantity);
        i = this.get_clothing_index(i);
        if (setup.clothes_stainless.includes(this.clothing_archetype(i).category) || this.clothing_has_flag(i, "waterproof")) return;
        let cItem = new ClothingItem(this.clothes[i]);
        let stains = cItem.get_property("stains") || {};
        if (Array.isArray(stains))
        {
                stains = {};
        }
        if (!stains[stain])
        {
            stains[stain] = 0;
        }
        const stainQuantity = Math.min(stains[stain] + quantity, 1000);
        stains[stain] = stainQuantity;
        cItem.set_property("stains", stains);
        this.clothes[i] = cItem.get_data_structure();
    }
    
    warm_coat_closet()
    {
        for (const i in V.clothingStorage_dormcloset)
        {
            let cItem = setup.clothes[V.clothingStorage_dormcloset[i].item];
            if (cItem.flags.includes("heavily warming") && cItem.covers.includesAll("back", "forearm", "waist") && cItem.category == "outerwear")
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    warm_coat_wear()

    warm_coat_object()
    {
        for (const i in V.clothingStorage_dormcloset)
        {
            let cItem = setup.clothes[V.clothingStorage_dormcloset[i].item];
            if (cItem.flags.includes("heavily warming") && cItem.covers.includesAll("back", "forearm", "waist") && cItem.category == "outerwear")
            {
                return V.clothingStorage_dormcloset[i];
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    clothing_skirt_length(skirt_length)
    {
        const skirtlength = ["micro", "mini", "short", "medium"];  
        const Index = (length) => skirtlength.indexOf(length);  

        const SkirtShort = (target, current) => {
            if (!target || !current) return false;
            const tarIndex = skirtlength.indexOf(target);
            const curIndex = skirtlength.indexOf(current);
            return (tarIndex !== -1 && curIndex !== -1) && (curIndex <= tarIndex);
        };
        
        let flags = this.get_clothing_flags("crotch", 2);
        let action_flags = flags.filter(s => s.includes("flip"))

        if (action_flags.filter(s => s.includes("certain")).length > 0)  
            return SkirtShort("micro", skirt_length);
        if (action_flags.filter(s => s.includes("high")).length > 0)
            return SkirtShort("mini", skirt_length);
        if (action_flags.filter(s => s.includes("medium")).length > 0)
            return SkirtShort("short", skirt_length);
        if (action_flags.filter(s => s.includes("low")).length > 0)
            return SkirtShort("medium", skirt_length);
        return false;
    }

setup.Time.cum_leak = function(minutes)
{
	if (V.pc.cumInsideVagina > 0 || V.pc.cumInsideAnus > 0)
	{
		let leak = setup.cum_calculation(V.pc, false, minutes);
    	const cumulatedLeak = Math.abs(leak);

    	if (V.pc.wearing_underwear() && V.pc.underwear_covering("crotch"))
    	{
        	const clothes = V.pc.underwear_covering("crotch");
        	V.pc.add_stain(clothes, "cum", cumulatedLeak);
    	}
    	else if (V.pc.wearing_pants() && !V.pc.underwear_access())
    	{
        	const clothes = V.pc.pants_equiv();
        	V.pc.add_stain(clothes, "cum", cumulatedLeak);
    	}
    	else
    	{
        	console.log("leak in thin air :", cumulatedLeak);
    	}
	}
}

setup.Time.Tarousal = function(minutes)
{
    const toysuse = V.pc.sextoysuse;
    if (!toysuse || Object.keys(toysuse).length == 0)
    {
        delete V.pc.sextoysuse;
        this.set_decay("Arousal", 60);
    }
    else
    {
        this.set_decay("Arousal", 11520);
        let result = 1;
        Object.keys(toysuse).forEach(key => {
            const keytoystr = setup.sextoys[key].strength;
            result += keytoystr * 1;
        });
        result *= minutes;
        console.log("Free arousal :", result);
        V.pc.add_arousal(result);
    }
}

setup.Time.set_decay = function(need, minutes)
{
    this.natural_decay_time[need] = minutes;
}

    is_orifice_plugged(part)
    {
        if (!this.sextoys) this.sextoys = [];
        for (let toy of this.sextoys)
        {
            let toyinfo = setup.sextoys[toy.item];
            if (toyinfo.worn == part && !toyinfo.types.includes("retain part availability") && !toyinfo.types.includes("allow flow"))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
~
    is_orifice_plugged(part)
    {
        if (this.sextoysuse)
        {
            for (let toy in this.sextoysuse)
            {
                if (this.sextoysuse[toy] == part) return true;
            }
        }
        if (!this.sextoys) this.sextoys = [];
        for (let toy of this.sextoys)
        {
            let toyinfo = setup.sextoys[toy.item];
            if (toyinfo.worn == part && !toyinfo.types.includes("retain part availability") && !toyinfo.types.includes("allow flow"))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    available_positions(target)
    {
        // pretty much just based on body parts
        // but we also have to gather some data on whether the target will get a chance to deny/resist the position change
        // which is based on whether we're putting them into the bottom position
        // also ai will mostly not want to swap between top and bottom

        let enc = this.encounter();

        if (enc.lockposition) return [];

        // generate a baseline list of possible acts with some data we'll need
        const poses = [];
        const positions = Object.keys(setup.sexpositions);
        for (let i = 0; i < positions.length; i++)
        {
            let pos = setup.sexpositions[positions[i]];
            if (!this.is_position_valid_for_encounter_type(positions[i])) continue;
            if (pos.deprecated) continue;
            if (pos.furniture && !setup.has_furniture_flag(pos.furniture)) continue;
            let top = this.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("top") && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]) && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]);
            let theytop = target.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("top") && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]) && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]);
            let bottom = this.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("bottom") && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]) && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]);
            let equal = "equal" in pos ? pos.equal : false;
            if (pos.equal && this.is_pc)
            {
                top = false;
                bottom = false;
                theytop = false;
            }
            if (enc.position_blocked(this, target, positions[i])) continue;
            let freq = pos.frequency;
            if (pos.inclinations && this.has_any_inclination(pos.inclinations)) freq = Math.floor(freq * 2.5);
            if (top)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: freq,
                                role: "top",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "top",
                                both: top && (bottom || theytop),
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
            if ((bottom || theytop) && !equal)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: freq,
                                role: "bottom",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "bottom",
                                both: top && (bottom || theytop),
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
            if (!top && !bottom && this.is_pc)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: pos.frequency,
                                role: "top",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "top",
                                both: true,
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
        }

        // further refine the list based on other factors
        const retval = [];
        let enctarget = this.encounter_target();
        if (!target.equals(this))
        {
            if (this.equals(enctarget) && target.equals(V.partner1) && enc.consensual)
            {
                // pc can select a position with partner1
                for (let i = 0; i < poses.length; i++)
                {
                    let pos = poses[i].position;
                    if (poses[i].position == this.position_with(target) && (poses[i].role == this.role_with(target) || poses[i].equal)) continue;
                    poses[i].original_label = pos;
                    let showrole = (poses[i].both && !poses[i].equal);
                    if (showrole)
                    {
                        let rolelabel = poses[i].role;
                        if (("label " + rolelabel) in setup.sexpositions[pos])
                            rolelabel = setup.sexpositions[pos]["label " + rolelabel];
                        pos = pos + " (" + rolelabel + ")";
                    }
                    poses[i].button = pos;
                    retval.push(poses[i]);
                }
            }
            else if (target.equals(enctarget))
            {
                // npcs can choose a position with the pc
                for (let i = 0; i < poses.length; i++)
                {
                    let pos = poses[i].position;
                    let role = poses[i].role;
                    if (!enc.consensual && role != "top")
                    {
                        continue;
                    }
                    else if (pos.position == this.position_with(target) && (pos.role == this.role_with(target) || pos.equal))
                        continue;
                    else if (enc.consensual && role != this.role_with(target))
                    {
                        continue;
                        // todo: some other ai stuff will go here based on inclinations, maybe
                    }
                    pos = pos + (poses[i].both ? (" (" + poses[i].role + ")") : "");
                    poses[i].button = pos;
                    retval.push(poses[i]);
                }
            }
        }

        return retval;
    }
~
    available_positions(target)
    {
        let enc = this.encounter();

        if (enc.lockposition) return [];

        const poses = [];
        const passives = enc.passives ? setup.passivespositions[enc.passives].lead : true;
        const positions = Object.keys(setup.sexpositions);
        for (let i = 0; i < positions.length; i++)
        {
            let pos = setup.sexpositions[positions[i]];
            if (!this.is_position_valid_for_encounter_type(positions[i])) continue;
            if (pos.deprecated) continue;
            if (pos.furniture && !setup.has_furniture_flag(pos.furniture)) continue;
            let top = this.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("top") && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]) && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]);
            let theytop = target.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("top") && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]) && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]);
            let bottom = this.is_role_valid_for_encounter_type("bottom") && this.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["bottom"]) && target.has_any_of_parts_for_position(pos["top"]);
            let equal = "equal" in pos ? pos.equal : false;
            if (pos.equal && this.is_pc)
            {
                top = false;
                bottom = false;
                theytop = false;
            }
            if (enc.position_blocked(this, target, positions[i])) continue;
            let freq = pos.frequency;
            if (pos.inclinations && this.has_any_inclination(pos.inclinations)) freq = Math.floor(freq * 2.5);
            if (top)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: freq,
                                role: "top",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "top",
                                both: top && (bottom || theytop),
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
            if ((bottom || theytop) && !equal)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: freq,
                                role: "bottom",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "bottom",
                                both: top && (bottom || theytop),
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
            if (!top && !bottom && this.is_pc)
            {
                poses.push({    position: positions[i],
                                frequency: pos.frequency,
                                role: "top",
                                swap: this.role_with(target) != "top",
                                both: true,
                                equal: equal,
                                furniture: pos.furniture});
            }
        }

        const retval = [];
        let enctarget = this.encounter_target();
        if (!target.equals(this))
        {
            if (this.equals(enctarget) && target.equals(V.partner1) && enc.consensual)
            {
                for (let i = 0; i < poses.length; i++)
                {
                    let pos = poses[i].position;
                    const role = poses[i].role;
                    if (passives !== true) 
                    {
                        if (!passives.includes(pos + ':' + role)) continue;
                    }
                    
                    if (poses[i].position == this.position_with(target) && (poses[i].role == this.role_with(target) || poses[i].equal)) continue;
                    poses[i].original_label = pos;
                    let showrole = (poses[i].both && !poses[i].equal);
                    if (showrole)
                    {
                        let rolelabel = poses[i].role;
                        if (("label " + rolelabel) in setup.sexpositions[pos])
                            rolelabel = setup.sexpositions[pos]["label " + rolelabel];
                        pos = pos + " (" + rolelabel + ")";
                    }
                    poses[i].button = pos;
                    retval.push(poses[i]);
                }
            }
            else if (target.equals(enctarget))
            {
                for (let i = 0; i < poses.length; i++)
                {
                    let pos = poses[i].position;
                    let role = poses[i].role;
                    if (!enc.consensual && role != "top")
                    {
                        continue;
                    }
                    else if (pos.position == this.position_with(target) && (pos.role == this.role_with(target) || pos.equal))
                        continue;
                    else if (enc.consensual && role != this.role_with(target))
                    {
                        continue;
                    }
                    pos = pos + (poses[i].both ? (" (" + poses[i].role + ")") : "");
                    poses[i].button = pos;
                    retval.push(poses[i]);
                }
            }
        }

        return retval;
    }
    
    available_passive_positions()
    {
        const enc = this.encounter();

        if (enc.lockposition) return {};

        const result = {};

        const passiveKeys = Object.keys(setup.passivespositions);
        const furniNames  = Object.keys(setup.room_contents());

        for (const passiveKey of passiveKeys) 
        {
            const posinfo = setup.passivespositions[passiveKey];

            if (!posinfo.furniture) continue;

            if (enc.passives && posinfo.evolve && !posinfo.evolve.includes(passiveKey)) 
            {
                continue;
            }

            for (const furn of furniNames) 
            {
                const furninfo = setup.RoomTypes.furniture[furn];

                const hasFlag = furninfo.flags.some(flag => posinfo.furniture.includes(flag));

                if (hasFlag) 
                {
                    if (!result[furn]) {
                        result[furn] = { alone: [] };
                    }

                    result[furn].alone.push({ position: passiveKey });
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    sort_passive_positions()
    {
        let sorted = {"none":[]};
        for (let pos of this.available_passive_positions())
        {
            let furniturelist = this.available_furniture_for_passive(pos.position);
            for (let furniture of furniturelist)
            {
                let cat = furniture || "none";
                let role = pos.equal ? "equal" : pos.role;
                if (!sorted[cat]) sorted[cat] = {};
                if (!sorted[cat][role]) sorted[cat][role] = [];
                sorted[cat][role].push(pos);
            }
        }
        return sorted;
    }
    
    available_furniture_for_passive(position)
    {
        const retval = [];
        const posinfo = setup.passivespositions[position];

        const contents = Object.keys(setup.room_contents());

        if (!posinfo.furniture) return [];

        for (const furn of contents)
        {
            const furninfo = setup.RoomTypes.furniture[furn];
            if (furninfo.flags.includesAny(posinfo.furniture))
                retval.push(furn);
        }
        return retval;
    }
    
    do_passive(pos, furn)

    add_drunkenness(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] + val > this.max_drunkenness())
            this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] = this.max_drunkenness();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["drunkenness"] = this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"];
    }

    add_drunkenness(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] + val > this.max_drunkenness())
            this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] = this.max_drunkenness();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["drunkenness"] = this.fleeting_stats["drunkenness"];
    }

    add_trauma(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["trauma"] + val > this.max_trauma())
            this.fleeting_stats["trauma"] = this.max_trauma();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["trauma"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["Trauma"] = this.fleeting_stats["trauma"];
    }

    add_lubricatedV(val)
    {
        if (val > 0)
        {
            if (this.has_inclination("High lubrication"))
                val /= 0.6;
            if (this.has_inclination("Low lubrication"))
                val *= 0.4;
        }
        if (this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] + val > this.max_lubricatedV())
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] = this.max_lubricatedV();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["LubricatedV"] = this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedV"];
    }

    add_lubricatedA(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"] + val > this.max_lubricatedA())
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"] = this.max_lubricatedA();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["LubricatedA"] = this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedA"];
    }

    add_lubricatedP(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"] + val > this.max_lubricatedP())
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"] = this.max_lubricatedP();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["LubricatedP"] = this.fleeting_stats["lubricatedP"];
    }

    add_vaginatightness(val)
    {
        if (this.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] + val > this.max_vaginatightness())
            this.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] = this.max_vaginatightness();
        else
            this.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"] += val;

        if (this.is_pc) V.pcneeds["Vaginatightness"] = this.fleeting_stats["vaginatightness"];

    add_anustightness(val)

<script>
var containers = document.querySelectorAll(".buttons-container");
containers.forEach(container => {
    var buttons = container.querySelectorAll(".btn");

    if (buttons.length >= 4)
    {
        buttons[3].classList.add("active");
    }
});
document.querySelectorAll(".btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function()
    {
        var currentContainer = this.closest(".buttons-container");
        if (currentContainer)
        {
            var buttons = currentContainer.querySelectorAll(".btn");
            buttons.forEach(button => button.classList.remove("active"));

            this.classList.add("active");
        }
    });
});
